---
title: "Zimbabwe_vPOPs"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Viral populations analysis

## Libraries and dependencies

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: true
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggbreak)
library(ggforce)
library(reshape)
library(ggExtra)
library(phyloseq)
library(vegan)
library(ggpubr)
library(gplots)
library(viridis) 
library(ggpmisc)
library(mgcv)
library(cluster)
library(VennDiagram)
library(rstatix)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(MuMIn)
library(multcomp)
library(caret)
library(tictoc)
library(randomForest)
library(purrr)
library(pROC)
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(plotly)
library(UpSetR)
library(ggplotify)
library(Cairo)
library(gridExtra)
library(phyloseq)
library(emmeans)
library(cowplot)
library(reshape2)
library(pheatmap)
library(Boruta)
library(ggmosaic)
source("models/functions_aim2.R")
```

## Color Palettes

```{r}
colorblind_palette = c("#0072B2","#56B4E9","#A285D1","#E69F00","#D55E00")

colorMAL_palette = c("#0072B2","#E69F00","#D55E00")

palette_qc=c("#009e73","#56b4e6","#cd9600","#c77cff","#ff61cc")

replication_palette=c("#6A5ACD","#228B22","gray30","gray60")

cbPalette_hosts <- c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#882255", "#009E73", "#F0E442",
  "#D55E00", "#CC79A7", "gray50","#56B4E9","#999999", "#44AA99", "#88CCEE")

prevalence_palette=c("#009e73","#56b4e6","#cd9600")

persistence_palette <- c("#D55E00", "#CC79A7", "#0072B2")

organism_palette <- c("#F05039","#1F449C")
```

## Experimental Design: Sample schedule and anthropometric measures, stratified by nutritional statuses and sex

```{r}
#Metadata
metadata_samples=read.csv("data/raw/metadata_Zimbabwe.csv",h=T)
metadata_samples = metadata_samples[!duplicated(metadata_samples$sample),]
metaphlan <- readRDS("data/raw/metaphlan.rds")
whz_muac_data=metaphlan[,c(3,273,161)]
whz_muac_data_dedup=whz_muac_data[!duplicated(whz_muac_data$Sample),]
metadata_samples = metadata_samples %>% left_join(whz_muac_data_dedup,by=c("sample"="Sample"),keep = F)

#Undernutrition
metadata_samples$MUW=ifelse(metadata_samples$waz< -2 & metadata_samples$waz>= -3,1,0)
metadata_samples$SUW=ifelse(metadata_samples$waz< -3,1,0)


#Acute malnutrition
metadata_samples$MAM=ifelse(metadata_samples$whz<= -2 & metadata_samples$whz>= -3,1,0)
metadata_samples$SAM=ifelse(metadata_samples$whz< -3,1,0)

#Chronic malnutrition
metadata_samples$MCM=ifelse(metadata_samples$laz<= -2 & metadata_samples$laz>= -3,1,0)
metadata_samples$SCM=ifelse(metadata_samples$laz< -3,1,0)

#Healthy development
metadata_samples$Healthy=ifelse(rowSums(metadata_samples[,10:15])== 0,1,0)

#Visualization dataset
upset_1=upset(metadata_samples,nsets=7,sets=c("MUW","SUW","MAM","SAM","MCM","SCM","Healthy"),order.by="freq",keep.order = T)

CairoSVG("assets/Malnutrition_all_categories",width=5)
upset_1
dev.off()

#Infant level (everything before is counts of samples)
metadata_samples$MAL_group=ifelse(metadata_samples$Healthy==1,"Normal growth",
                                  ifelse(metadata_samples$MCM == 1 & metadata_samples$MAM == 0,"Moderate stunting",
                                         ifelse(metadata_samples$SCM == 1,"Severe stunting",
                                                ifelse(metadata_samples$SAM==1,"SAM",
                                                        ifelse(metadata_samples$MAM==1,"MAM",
                                                              ifelse(metadata_samples$MUW & rowSums(metadata_samples[,10:15])==1,"Healthy_UW","Not_determined"))))))



#ggplot(metadata_samples,aes(x=age,y=subjectID.x,color=MAL_group,group=subjectID.x))+geom_point()+geom_line(color="gray")+ theme_minimal()+scale_color_manual(values = colorblind_palette)

print(paste("Number of infants = ",length(unique(metadata_samples$subjectID.x))))


#Remove acute malnutrition and healthy underweight or unidentified.
metadata_samples= metadata_samples[!metadata_samples$MAL_group %in% c("MAM","SAM","Healthy_UW","NA"),]
metadata_samples=metadata_samples[!is.na(metadata_samples$MAL_group),]
metadata_samples=droplevels(metadata_samples)

# Apply the function to each row and create a new dataframe which will have the nutritional status per infant
result <- metadata_samples %>% group_by(subjectID.x) %>%  arrange(age) %>%
  summarize(stunted_status = map_chr(list((MAL_group)),classify_transitions))

all_children=metadata_samples %>% left_join(result,by="subjectID.x",keep = F) %>% drop_na(stunted_status) 

print(paste("Number of infants = ",length(unique(all_children$subjectID.x))))
print(paste("Number of samples = ",length(unique(all_children$sample))))

all_children$MAL_group=factor(all_children$MAL_group,levels=c("Normal growth","Moderate stunting","Severe stunting"))

# Adding numbers of observations
label_counts <- all_children %>% add_count(MAL_group) %>% group_by(stunted_status) %>% mutate(nn=n_distinct(subjectID.x)) %>% 
  mutate(MAL_group_labeled = paste0(MAL_group, " (n=", n, ")"), 
         stunted_status_labeled = paste0(stunted_status, " (n=", nn, ")"))

label_counts$MAL_group_labeled <- factor(
  label_counts$MAL_group_labeled,
  levels = unlist(lapply(c("Normal", "Moderate", "Severe"), function(pat) {
    unique(label_counts$MAL_group_labeled[grep(pat, label_counts$MAL_group_labeled)])
  })))


all_children = all_children[!all_children$stunted_status %in% unique(label_counts$stunted_status[label_counts$nn<=5]),]
all_children = droplevels(all_children)

all_children$trajectory = ifelse(all_children$stunted_status=="Normal growth","Consistent normal growth",ifelse(all_children$stunted_status=="Moderate stunting","Consistent moderate stunting",ifelse(all_children$stunted_status=="Severe stunting","Consistent severe stunting",ifelse(all_children$stunted_status=="Normal growth , Moderate stunting","Decline to moderate stunting","Recovery to normal growth"))))

all_children$trajectory = factor(all_children$trajectory,levels=c("Consistent normal growth","Recovery to normal growth","Decline to moderate stunting","Consistent moderate stunting","Consistent severe stunting"))

print(paste("Number of infants = ",length(unique(all_children$subjectID.x))))
print(paste("Number of samples = ",length(unique(all_children$sample))))


# Adding numbers of observations
label_counts <- all_children %>% add_count(MAL_group) %>% group_by(trajectory) %>% mutate(nn=n_distinct(subjectID.x)) %>% 
  mutate(MAL_group_labeled = paste0(MAL_group, " (n=", n, ")"), 
         stunted_status_labeled = paste0(trajectory, " (n=", nn, ")"))

label_counts$MAL_group_labeled <- factor(
  label_counts$MAL_group_labeled,
  levels = unlist(lapply(c("Normal", "Moderate", "Severe"), function(pat) {
    unique(label_counts$MAL_group_labeled[grep(pat, label_counts$MAL_group_labeled)])
  })))

label_counts$stunted_status_labeled <- factor(
  label_counts$stunted_status_labeled,
  levels = unlist(lapply(c("Consistent normal growth","Recovery to normal growth","Decline to moderate stunting","Consistent moderate stunting","Consistent severe stunting"), function(pat) {
    unique(label_counts$stunted_status_labeled[grep(pat, label_counts$stunted_status_labeled)])
  })))

plot_selected_statuses=ggplot(label_counts,aes(x=age,y=subjectID.x,color=MAL_group_labeled,group=subjectID.x))+geom_point(size=1)+geom_line(color="gray",size=0.5)+theme_classic( base_size = 25)+scale_color_manual(values = colorblind_palette[-c(2:3)],name="")+facet_wrap(~stunted_status_labeled,nrow=1,labeller = label_wrap_gen(width = 20))+theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),legend.position = "bottom")+ylab("Infant")+xlab("Infant chronological age (days)")

#ggsave(plot_selected_statuses,filename = "assets/SupplementaryFig1B.png",device = "png",width=450,height =250,unit="mm")

#Analyses of reads mapped: alignment rate: percentage of reads from each sample that aligned to the vPOPs (Zimbabwe + GVD).  
read_mapp_dist=read.table("data/processed/aln_stats_reads_to_vOTUs.txt",sep=",",h=F)
names(read_mapp_dist)=c("accession","proportion_reads_mapped","total_reads")
all_children= all_children %>% left_join(read_mapp_dist,by="accession") 
all_children$vOTU_reads=(all_children$proportion_reads_mapped*all_children$total_reads)/100
all_children$type=ifelse(grepl(",",all_children$trajectory),"transitioning","consistent")  

plot_vOTUreads_time=all_children %>% ggplot(aes(y=vOTU_reads,x=age,color=trajectory))+
  facet_wrap(~type)+geom_point()+geom_smooth(method="lm")+ scale_color_manual(values = colorblind_palette)+theme_bw()
#ggsave(plot_vOTUreads_time,filename = "assets/vOTUreads_time.png",device = "png",width=200,height =100,unit="mm")


##### Sex Partition #####

sex2infant=metaphlan[,c(3,244)]
sex2infant=sex2infant[!duplicated(sex2infant$Sample),]

all_children = all_children %>% left_join(sex2infant, by = c("sample"="Sample"),keep = F)

# Adding numbers of observations
label_counts <- all_children %>% group_by(sex) %>% add_count(MAL_group) %>% 
  mutate(MAL_group_labeled_bysex = paste0(MAL_group, " (n=", n, ")"))

label_counts$MAL_group_labeled_bysex <- factor(
  label_counts$MAL_group_labeled_bysex,
  levels = unlist(lapply(c("Normal", "Moderate", "Severe"), function(pat) {
    unique(label_counts$MAL_group_labeled_bysex[grep(pat, label_counts$MAL_group_labeled_bysex)])
  })))

significant_comparisons <- function(values,group.vector,adjust.method,paired){
  if(missing(paired)){paired=F}
  #Filter out groups with n<2
  groups_n_greater_1 = names(table(group.vector)[table(group.vector)>1])
  values=values[group.vector %in% groups_n_greater_1]
  group.vector=group.vector[group.vector %in% groups_n_greater_1]
  
  #Group stats
  test=pairwise.wilcox.test(values, group.vector,p.adjust.method = adjust.method, paired = paired)
  #Generate list with significant comparisons
  p.list=list()
  for(i in 1:nrow(test$p.value)){
    for(k in 1:ncol(test$p.value)){
      if(is.na(test$p.value[i,k])==F){
        if(test$p.value[i,k]<=0.05){p.list=c(p.list,list(c(rownames(test$p.value)[i],colnames(test$p.value)[k])))}
      }
    }
  }
  return(p.list)
}

label_counts <- label_counts %>% ungroup() %>% add_count(MAL_group) %>% 
  mutate(MAL_group_labeled = paste0(MAL_group, " (n=", nn, ")")) %>% 
  add_count(sex,name = "sex_count") %>% mutate(sex_labeled = paste0(sex, " (n=", sex_count, ")"))

label_counts$MAL_group_labeled <- factor(
  label_counts$MAL_group_labeled,
  levels = unlist(lapply(c("Normal", "Moderate", "Severe"), function(pat) {
    unique(label_counts$MAL_group_labeled[grep(pat, label_counts$MAL_group_labeled)])
  })))


whz_plot=ggplot(label_counts,aes(y=whz,x=MAL_group,color=MAL_group))+
  geom_point()+geom_boxplot()+
  geom_hline(yintercept = -2,linetype = 3)+geom_hline(yintercept = -3,linetype = 3)+
  scale_color_manual(values = colorMAL_palette,guide="none")+
  theme_classic(base_size = 30)+xlab("")+
  annotate("rect",ymin=-3,ymax=-2,xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,fill=colorMAL_palette[2],alpha=0.2)+
  annotate("rect",ymin=-Inf,ymax=-3,xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,fill=colorMAL_palette[3],alpha=0.2)+
  facet_wrap(~sex_labeled,scales="free_x")+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90,vjust = 0.5,hjust = 1),axis.text.y = element_text(angle=90,hjust=0.5),strip.background = element_blank(),strip.text = element_blank())+  ylab("Weight-for-Height Z-score (WHZ)")+  stat_compare_means(comparisons =  significant_comparisons(label_counts$whz,label_counts$MAL_group,adjust.method="bonferroni",paired=F),na.rm = T, label = "p.signif", method = "wilcox.test",hide.ns = T)


laz_plot=ggplot(label_counts,aes(y=laz,x=MAL_group,color=MAL_group_labeled))+
  geom_point()+geom_boxplot()+
  geom_hline(yintercept = -2,linetype = 3)+geom_hline(yintercept = -3,linetype = 3)+
  scale_color_manual(values = colorMAL_palette,name="")+
  theme_classic(base_size = 30)+xlab("")+
  annotate("rect",ymin=-3,ymax=-2,xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,fill=colorMAL_palette[2],alpha=0.2)+
  annotate("rect",ymin=-Inf,ymax=-3,xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,fill=colorMAL_palette[3],alpha=0.2)+
  facet_wrap(~sex_labeled,scales="free_x")+theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),axis.text.y = element_text(angle=90,hjust=0.5),legend.position = "none")+ ylab("Length-for-Age Z-score (LHZ)")+ stat_compare_means(comparisons = significant_comparisons(label_counts$laz,label_counts$MAL_group,adjust.method="bonferroni",paired=F),na.rm = T, label = "p.signif", method = "wilcox.test",hide.ns = F)

library(patchwork)
cohort_caracterization = laz_plot / whz_plot

combined_plot = cohort_caracterization +  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1)) & 
    theme(plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(5, 5, 5, 5))

#ggsave(filename = "assets/cohort_caracterization.png",plot = combined_plot,width = 300, height = 420, units = "mm")

waz_plot=ggplot(label_counts,aes(y=waz,x=MAL_group_labeled_bysex,color=MAL_group_labeled))+ geom_point()+geom_boxplot()+ geom_hline(yintercept = -2,linetype = 3)+geom_hline(yintercept = -3,linetype = 3)+ scale_color_manual(values = colorMAL_palette,guide="none")+
  theme_classic(base_size = 27)+xlab("")+
  annotate("rect",ymin=-3,ymax=-2,xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,fill=colorMAL_palette[2],alpha=0.2)+
  annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = -2.25, label = "Moderate", hjust = -0.1, vjust = 0.5, size = 3) +
  annotate("rect",ymin=-Inf,ymax=-3,xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,fill=colorMAL_palette[3],alpha=0.2)+
  annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = -3.25, label = "Severe", hjust = -0.1, vjust = 0.5, size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~sex,scales="free_x")+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90,vjust = 0.5,hjust = 1),axis.title.y = element_text())+ ylab("Weigth-for-age Z-score (waz)")+stat_compare_means(comparisons = significant_comparisons(label_counts$waz,label_counts$MAL_group,adjust.method="bonferroni",paired=F),na.rm = T, label = "p.signif", method = "wilcox.test",hide.ns = F)


muac_plot = ggplot(label_counts,aes(y=muac,x=MAL_group,color=MAL_group_labeled))+
  geom_point()+geom_boxplot()+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 125,linetype = 3)+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 115,linetype = 3)+
  scale_color_manual(values = colorMAL_palette,name="")+
  theme_classic(base_size = 30)+xlab("")+
  annotate("rect",ymin=115,ymax=125,xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,fill=colorMAL_palette[2],alpha=0.2)+
  annotate("rect",ymin=-Inf,ymax=115,xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,fill=colorMAL_palette[3],alpha=0.2)+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90,vjust = 0.5,hjust = 1),axis.text.y = element_text(angle=90,hjust=0.5),legend.position = "none")+ ylab("Middle Upper Arm Circumference (mm)")+ stat_compare_means(comparisons = significant_comparisons(label_counts$muac,label_counts$MAL_group,adjust.method="bonferroni",paired=F),na.rm = T, label = "p.signif", method = "wilcox.test",hide.ns = T)+facet_wrap(~sex_labeled,scales="free_x")

#ggsave("assets/muac.png", plot = muac_plot, width = 10, height = 11.5)
#ggplot(label_counts,aes(y=whz,x=laz,color=is.na(muac)))+ geom_point()+theme_classic(base_size = 30)
#ggplot(label_counts,aes(y=age,x=reorder(subjectID.x,muac),color=is.na(muac)))+ geom_point()+geom_line()+theme_classic(base_size = 30)

```

## Ecological Analyses

### Bacterial Communities: Data Import from Metaphlan

```{r}
#Metaphlan result (cedar: /project/rrg-corinnem/lcamelo/Robertson_etal_2023/17.read_based_bacterial_analyses/)
profile=read.table("data/processed/all_samples_metaphlan4_output.csv",sep=",",h=F)
names(profile)=c("species","value","sample")
profile = profile %>% group_by(sample,species) %>% summarise(rel.ab=sum(value)) 
profile$species =factor(profile$species)
profile$sample =factor(profile$sample)


abundance_table = profile %>% pivot_wider(names_from = "species",values_from = "rel.ab",values_fill = 0)
metadata = all_children[,-5]
profile_metadata = abundance_table %>% left_join(metadata,by=c("sample"="accession"))
profile_metadata = profile_metadata %>% drop_na(subjectID.x)

#Bacteroides and E.coli relationship 
profile %>% filter(grepl("Bacteroides",species) | grepl("Escherichia_coli",species)) %>% pivot_wider(names_from = "species",values_from = "rel.ab",values_fill = 0) %>% left_join(metadata,by=c("sample"="accession")) %>% ungroup() %>% mutate(Bacteroides_total = rowSums(select(., starts_with("s__Bacteroides")), na.rm = TRUE)) %>% ggplot(aes(x=s__Escherichia_coli,y=Bacteroides_total,color=laz))+geom_point()

```

### Viral Communities: Data Import, quality control, host and life cycle prediction, prevalence and persistence

I dereplicated the viral genomes identified with genomad at 95% ANI along 85% of the sequences. These resulted in 22,937 viral OTUs, and reads from all samples were mapped to it.

```{r}
#Coverage file
#PREFILTERED IN BASH (COVERAGE/BREADTH > 75 & MEANDEPTH > 1)
vPOP_coverage=read.table("data/processed/phage_coverage_0_600_filtered.tsv",h=F)
names(vPOP_coverage) = c("sample","contig","startpos","endpos","numreads","covbases","coverage","meandepth","meanbaseq","meanmapq")
vPOP_coverage =vPOP_coverage[,c(1,2,7,8)]
names(vPOP_coverage)=c("sample","contig","coverage","meandepth")

vPOP_coverage = vPOP_coverage[vPOP_coverage$sample %in% all_children$accession,]
length(unique(vPOP_coverage$sample))

#checkV results
qc_results=read.table("data/processed/vOTU_dereplicated_checkV.tsv",h=T,sep="\t")

qc_results$checkv_quality=factor(qc_results$checkv_quality,levels=c("Complete","High-quality","Medium-quality","Low-quality","Not-determined"))
qc_results$quality_dummy="Quality"

accession_pattern <- paste(all_children$accession, collapse = "|")


qc_results$origin=ifelse(grepl(accession_pattern,qc_results$contig_id),"Zimbabwe","GVD")
qc_results$origin=factor(qc_results$origin)

qc_results = qc_results[qc_results$contig_id %in% unique(vPOP_coverage$contig),]


GVD_vs_Zimb_plot = ggplot(qc_results,aes(x=origin,fill=checkv_quality))+geom_bar()+scale_fill_manual(values=palette_qc)+theme_bw()+xlab("")+ylab("Number of vOTUs")
#ggsave(GVD_vs_Zimb_plot,filename = "assets/GVD_vs_Zimb_plot.png",device = "png",width=100,height =80,unit="mm")


# Adding numbers of observations
label_counts <- qc_results %>% add_count(checkv_quality) %>% 
  mutate(checkv_quality_labeled = paste0(checkv_quality, " (n=", n, ")"))

label_counts$checkv_quality_labeled <- factor(
  label_counts$checkv_quality_labeled,
  levels = unlist(lapply(c("Complete", "High", "Medium","Low","Not-determined"), function(pat) {
    unique(label_counts$checkv_quality_labeled[grep(pat, label_counts$checkv_quality_labeled)])
  })))

plot_quality=ggplot(label_counts,aes(x=quality_dummy,fill=checkv_quality_labeled))+geom_bar()+scale_fill_manual(values=palette_qc,name="Quality Category")+xlab("")+ylab("Number of vOTUs")+theme_classic()+theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),axis.ticks.x = element_blank())
#ggsave(plot_quality,filename = "assets/plot_quality.png",device = "png",width=100,height =80,unit="mm")


quality_dist_plot = ggplot(label_counts,aes(x=completeness,y=contamination,color=checkv_quality_labeled))+geom_jitter(size=0.1,width = 1,height = 1)+theme_bw()+scale_color_manual(values=palette_qc,name="")+theme_classic(base_size = 10)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,hjust = 1,vjust = 0.5),axis.title = element_text(size = 10),axis.text = element_text(size = 10),    strip.text = element_text(size = 10),legend.title = element_text(size = 10),legend.text = element_text(size = 10))

#ggsave(quality_dist_plot,filename = "assets/quality_dist_plot.png",device = "png",width=100,height =70,unit="mm")

# Life Cycle
bacphlip=read.table("data/processed/BACPHLIP_pred_all_vOTUs.txt",sep="\t")
names(bacphlip)=c("contig","virulent_prob","temporate_prob")
bacphlip$replication_cycle=ifelse(bacphlip$virulent_prob>0.5,"Virulent",ifelse(bacphlip$temporate_prob>0.5,"Temperate","NoConfidence"))


bacphlip = bacphlip %>% left_join(qc_results,by=c("contig"="contig_id"))

bacphlip_filt=bacphlip[bacphlip$checkv_quality %in% c("Complete","High-quality","Medium-quality"),]
bacphlip_filt$replication_cycle[(bacphlip_filt$checkv_quality %in% c("High-quality","Medium-quality") & bacphlip_filt$replication_cycle %in% c("Virulent"))] = "Non-temperate"
bacphlip_filt = bacphlip_filt[-which(bacphlip_filt$replication_cycle =="NoConfidence"),]
bacphlip_filt=droplevels(bacphlip_filt)

bacphlip_filt = bacphlip_filt[bacphlip_filt$contig %in% unique(vPOP_coverage$contig),]


label_counts <- bacphlip_filt %>% add_count(replication_cycle,checkv_quality) %>% 
  mutate(replication_cycle_labeled = paste0(replication_cycle, " (n=", n, ")"))

label_counts$replication_cycle <- factor(
  label_counts$replication_cycle,
  levels = unlist(lapply(c("Virulent", "Temperate", "Non-temperate"), function(pat) {
    unique(label_counts$replication_cycle[grep(pat, label_counts$replication_cycle)])
  }))) 

label_counts$replication_cycle_labeled <- factor(
  label_counts$replication_cycle_labeled,
  levels = unlist(lapply(c("Virulent", "Temperate", "Non-temperate"), function(pat) {
    unique(label_counts$replication_cycle_labeled[grep(pat, label_counts$replication_cycle_labeled)])
  })))


life_cycle_qc_plot=ggplot(label_counts,aes(x=replication_cycle_labeled,y=contig_length,color=replication_cycle))+geom_boxplot(size = 1) +geom_jitter(alpha=0.2,size=0.4,position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.5))+scale_y_log10()+scale_color_manual(values=replication_palette,name="")+ylab("Contig length (bp)")+xlab("")+ facet_wrap(~checkv_quality,scales = "free_x")+theme_classic(base_size = 20)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30,hjust = 1,vjust = 1),axis.title.y = element_text(margin = ggplot2::margin(r=30)),strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"), legend.position = "top",legend.key.width = unit(4,"cm"),legend.spacing.x = unit(3,"cm"))+guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 1, label.position = "top",byrow = TRUE))


#ggsave(life_cycle_qc_plot,filename = "assets/lifeCycle_length.png",device = "png",width=150,height = 200,unit="mm",dpi=300)

#Host Information 
host_assignment = read.table("data/processed/iphop_host_pred_dereplicated_vPOP.txt",sep=",",h=T)

length(unique(host_assignment$Virus)) #59132 out of 73471 vPOPs have a predicted host (80%)

host_pred_dedup <- host_assignment %>% group_by(Virus) %>% arrange(desc(Confidence.score)) %>% slice(1) # pick most confident hit
host_pred_dedup <- host_pred_dedup[,c(1,2,3,5)]

host_pred_split <- host_pred_dedup %>% 
  separate(col = Host.taxonomy, into = c("domain", "phylum", "class", "order", "family", "genus", "species"), sep = ";")

host_pred_split$domain <- gsub("d__", "", host_pred_split$domain)
host_pred_split$phylum <- gsub("p__", "", host_pred_split$phylum)
host_pred_split$class <- gsub("c__", "", host_pred_split$class)
host_pred_split$order <- gsub("o__", "", host_pred_split$order)
host_pred_split$family <- gsub("f__", "", host_pred_split$family)
host_pred_split$genus <- gsub("g__", "", host_pred_split$genus)
host_pred_split$species <- gsub("s__", "", host_pred_split$species)

length(intersect(host_pred_split$Virus,unique(vPOP_coverage$contig)))/length(unique(vPOP_coverage$contig))
#91% assigned host at the moment

vPOP_coverage_lifeStyle = vPOP_coverage %>% left_join(bacphlip_filt[,c(1,4)],by="contig") 
vPOP_coverage_lifeStyle$replication_cycle[is.na(vPOP_coverage_lifeStyle$replication_cycle)]="Unassigned replication cycle"

vPOP_coverage_lifeStyle = vPOP_coverage_lifeStyle %>% left_join(host_pred_split[,c(1,7)], by = c("contig"="Virus"))

#NEEDS HOST INFORMATION
db_vOTUs_infats= vPOP_coverage_lifeStyle %>% dplyr::select(contig,replication_cycle,family) %>% distinct()  
db_vOTUs_infats$assignment=ifelse(is.na(db_vOTUs_infats$family) | db_vOTUs_infats$family =="" ,"Unassigned","Assigned")

db_vOTUs_infats$family[db_vOTUs_infats$family ==""] = NA

label_counts <- db_vOTUs_infats %>% add_count(replication_cycle) %>% add_count(assignment) %>%
  mutate(replication_cycle_labeled = paste0(replication_cycle, " (n=", n, ")"),
         assignment_labeled = paste0(assignment, " (n=", nn, ")"))

label_counts_host_plot = label_counts %>% count(family) %>% arrange(desc(n)) %>% mutate(percentage=n/sum(n)) %>% mutate(cum_percentage=cumsum(percentage)) %>% mutate(host=ifelse(cum_percentage<=0.75,family,"Other (n = 111)")) %>% select(family,host) %>% distinct()
#family=family,cum_percentage=cum_percentage,
label_counts_df = label_counts %>% select(family,replication_cycle_labeled) %>% left_join(label_counts_host_plot,by="family")

label_counts_host_plot$host = factor(label_counts_host_plot$host, levels = c("Bacteroidaceae","Lachnospiraceae","Ruminococcaceae","Enterobacteriaceae","Veillonellaceae","Bifidobacteriaceae","Oscillospiraceae","Other (n = 111)"))

label_counts$replication_cycle_labeled <- factor(
  label_counts$replication_cycle_labeled,
  levels = unlist(lapply(c("Virulent", "Temperate", "Non-temperate","Unassigned replication cycle"), function(pat) {
    unique(label_counts$replication_cycle_labeled[grep(pat, label_counts$replication_cycle_labeled)])
  })))

hosts_assigned_plot = label_counts %>% select(family,replication_cycle_labeled,assignment_labeled) %>% left_join(label_counts_host_plot,by="family") %>% ggplot() + geom_bar(aes(x=replication_cycle_labeled,fill=host),position = "fill", width = 0.8,alpha=0.7) +  theme_classic(base_size = 20) + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),axis.line = element_blank(),axis.text = element_text(margin = ggplot2::margin(l=0,r=5,unit="pt")),axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0, "cm"),axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.2, "cm")) +scale_fill_manual(values = cbPalette_hosts,name="Host family")+xlab("")+ylab("")+scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)))+scale_x_discrete(expand = expansion(add = c(0.5, 0.5)))

#ggsave(hosts_assigned_plot,filename = "assets/hostAssigment.png",device = "png",width=300,height = 200,unit="mm",dpi=300)

# Calculate prevalence per contig (NOT TAKING INTO ACCOUNT STUNTED STATUS)
vPOP_metadata_cov = vPOP_coverage_lifeStyle %>% left_join(all_children[,c(1,2,3,4,6,7,8,9,17,18)],
                                               by = c("sample" = "accession"),keep=F)
NumberInfants=length(unique(vPOP_metadata_cov$subjectID.x))

vPOP_prevalence_all <- vPOP_metadata_cov %>% ungroup()%>% group_by(contig) %>%
  summarize(prevalence = n_distinct(subjectID.x)/NumberInfants, .groups = "drop") 

vPOP_prevalence_all <- vPOP_prevalence_all %>%  mutate(category_prevalence = case_when(
    prevalence >= 0.7 ~ "Common", prevalence < 0.2 ~ "Rare", TRUE ~ "Moderate")) %>% 
  mutate(category_prevalence = factor(category_prevalence, levels = c("Rare", "Moderate", "Common")))

label_counts <- vPOP_prevalence_all %>%
  add_count(category_prevalence) %>%
  mutate(prevalence_label = paste0(category_prevalence, " (n=", n, ")"))

label_counts$prevalence_label <- factor(
  label_counts$prevalence_label,
  levels = unlist(lapply(c("Rare", "Moderate", "Common"), function(pat) {
    unique(label_counts$prevalence_label[grep(pat, label_counts$prevalence_label)])
  }))
)

prevalence_plot=ggplot(label_counts, aes(x = prevalence, fill = prevalence_label)) +
    geom_bar() + theme_bw() + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = prevalence_palette,name = "",
                    labels = function(x) str_replace(x, " \\(", "\\\n\\(")) +
    scale_y_sqrt() +
    xlab("Prevalence") +
    ylab("No. of vOTUs")+
    theme_classic(base_size = 20) + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60,hjust = 1,vjust = 1),legend.key.width = unit(3, "cm"),legend.text = element_text(lineheight = 0.8),legend.position = "top",legend.spacing.x = unit(1, "cm"))+
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1, label.position = "top",byrow = TRUE))

#ggsave(prevalence_plot,filename = "assets/prevalence_ALL.png",device = "png",width=300,height = 200,unit="mm",dpi=300)


# Persistence Calculations Number of timepoints where a vOTU is present in infant (NOT TAKING INTO ACCOUNT HEALTH STATUS)

vPOP_persistence_ALL= vPOP_metadata_cov %>% ungroup() %>% group_by(subjectID.x,contig) %>% summarise(timepoints=n_distinct(age)) %>%  group_by(contig) %>% summarise(median_persistence=median(timepoints))

vPOP_persistence_ALL <- vPOP_persistence_ALL %>%
  mutate(category_persistence = case_when(median_persistence >= 2.5 ~ "Highly Persistent",
    median_persistence < 1.5 ~ "Non Persistent", TRUE ~ "Moderately persistent"
  )) %>% mutate(category_persistence = factor(category_persistence,                                            levels = c("Non Persistent", "Moderately persistent", "Highly Persistent")))


label_counts <- vPOP_persistence_ALL %>%
  add_count(category_persistence) %>%
  mutate(persistence_label = paste0(category_persistence, " (n=", n, ")"))

label_counts$persistence_label <- factor(
  label_counts$persistence_label,
  levels = unlist(lapply(c("Non", "Moderately", "Highly"), function(pat) {
    unique(label_counts$persistence_label[grep(pat, label_counts$persistence_label)])
  }))
)

persistence_plot=ggplot(label_counts, aes(x = median_persistence, fill = persistence_label)) +
    geom_bar() + theme_bw() + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = persistence_palette, name = "",
                    labels = function(x) str_replace(x, " \\(", "\\\n\\(")) +
    scale_y_sqrt() +
    xlab("Persistence") +
    ylab("No. of vOTUs") + theme_classic(base_size = 20) + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60,hjust = 1,vjust = 1),legend.key.width = unit(5.5, "cm"),legend.text = element_text(lineheight = 0.8),legend.position = "top",legend.spacing.x = unit(2, "cm"))+guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1, label.position = "top",byrow = TRUE))


#ggsave(persistence_plot,filename = "assets/persistence_ALL.png",device = "png",width=300,height = 200,unit="mm",dpi=300)

age_diffs <- vPOP_metadata_cov %>% distinct(subjectID.x, contig, age) %>% group_by(subjectID.x, contig) %>% filter(n() > 1) %>% arrange(age) %>% mutate(diff = age - lag(age)) %>% filter(!is.na(diff)) %>% ungroup()

mean_tp <- vPOP_metadata_cov %>% ungroup() %>% group_by(subjectID.x,contig) %>% mutate(timepoints=n_distinct(age)) %>% ungroup() %>% group_by(subjectID.x,contig) %>% mutate(timepoints=n_distinct(age)) %>%
    group_by(contig) %>%
    summarise(avg_tp = mean(timepoints, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    mutate(persistence_cat = case_when(
        avg_tp < 1.5 ~ "Non-persistent",
        avg_tp >= 1.5 & avg_tp <= 2.5 ~ "Moderately persistent",
        avg_tp > 2.5 ~ "Highly persistent"
    )) %>%
    mutate(persistence_cat = factor(persistence_cat, levels = c(
        "Non-persistent", 
        "Moderately persistent", 
        "Highly persistent"
    )))

age_diffs_colored <- age_diffs %>%
    left_join(mean_tp, by = "contig")

days_between_detection=ggplot(age_diffs_colored, aes(x = "", y = diff,fill = persistence_cat)) + 
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(adjust = .5, width = .6, .width = 0, justification = -.2, 
        point_colour = NA, alpha = 0.8) +    
  geom_boxplot(width = .06, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.3, color = "grey50",
               median.linewidth =1) +
  ggdist::stat_dots(aes(color = persistence_cat, fill = persistence_cat), 
        side = "left", justification = 1.1, binwidth = NA, dotsize = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = persistence_palette, name = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = persistence_palette, name = "")+
    labs(title = "Persistence Interval of vOTUs",
        y = "Days Between Detections",
        x = "") + coord_flip() + theme_bw() +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
       legend.text = element_text(size = 12,lineheight = 0.8),legend.position = "top",
      legend.spacing.x = unit(1, "cm"),
      legend.key.width = unit(2, "cm"))+
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1, label.position = "top",byrow = TRUE))

#ggsave(days_between_detection,filename = "assets/days_between_detection.png",device = "png",width=200,height = 150,unit="mm")

viruses_characterization_ab = plot_grid(life_cycle_qc_plot,hosts_assigned_plot,ncol = 2,labels = c("A","B"),rel_widths = c(0.4,0.6),align = "h",axis = "lr",label_size = 24)

viruses_characterization_cd = plot_grid(prevalence_plot,persistence_plot,ncol = 2,labels = c("C","D"),rel_widths = c(0.5,0.5),align = "h",axis = "lr",label_size = 24)
viruses_characterization_cd

viruses_characterization= plot_grid(viruses_characterization_ab,viruses_characterization_cd,ncol = 1,labels = c("",""),rel_heights = c(0.6,0.4),align = "h",axis = "lr")

#viruses_characterization
#ggsave(viruses_characterization,filename = "assets/viruses_characterization.png",device = "png",width=500,height = 400,unit="mm")
```

### Alpha diversity - Estimates

```{r}
# Bacteria 

table_alphaDiv = profile %>% group_by(sample) %>% 
  summarise(sp_obs=specnumber(rel.ab),
            shannon=diversity(rel.ab,index="shannon"),
            simpson=diversity(rel.ab,index = "simpson"),
            pielou=ifelse(sp_obs > 1, shannon / log(sp_obs), 0),
            n=sum(rel.ab))

df_alphadiv = table_alphaDiv %>% left_join(all_children,by=c("sample"="accession"))
df_alphadiv = df_alphadiv[!is.na(df_alphadiv$subjectID.x),]
df_alphadiv$subjectID.x =factor(df_alphadiv$subjectID.x)
df_alphadiv$trajectory =factor(df_alphadiv$trajectory)

depth_lm=lm(total_reads~age,df_alphadiv)
summary(depth_lm)

library(mgcv)
data_gam_bacteria=df_alphadiv
data_gam_bacteria$shannon_scaled = scale(data_gam_bacteria$shannon)

#NO gamma function because it loses power 
gam_shannon_bacteria <- gam(shannon_scaled ~ s(age,bs = "tp", by=trajectory) + trajectory + s(total_reads,bs="tp") + trajectory+ s(subjectID.x, bs = "re") , data = data_gam_bacteria)
AIC(gam_shannon_bacteria)
summary(gam_shannon_bacteria)

data_gam_bacteria$richness_scaled = scale(data_gam_bacteria$sp_obs)
gam_richness_bacteria <- gam(richness_scaled ~ s(age,bs = "tp", by=trajectory) + trajectory + s(total_reads,bs="tp") + trajectory+ s(subjectID.x, bs = "re") , data = data_gam_bacteria)
AIC(gam_richness_bacteria)
summary(gam_richness_bacteria)

data_gam_bacteria$evenness_scaled = scale(data_gam_bacteria$pielou)
gam_evenness_bacteria <- gam(evenness_scaled ~ s(age,bs = "tp", by=trajectory) + trajectory + s(total_reads,bs="tp") + trajectory+ s(subjectID.x, bs = "re") , data = data_gam_bacteria)
AIC(gam_evenness_bacteria)
summary(gam_evenness_bacteria)

data_gam_bacteria$organism = "Bacteria"

# age grid
age_range <- seq(min(data_gam_bacteria$age), max(data_gam_bacteria$age)-50, length.out = 10)

emm_richness= emmeans_alpha(gam_richness_bacteria,age_range,data_gam_bacteria)
emm_richness$metric="Richness"
emm_shannon= emmeans_alpha(gam_shannon_bacteria,age_range,data_gam_bacteria)
emm_shannon$metric="Shannon"
emm_pielou= emmeans_alpha(gam_evenness_bacteria,age_range,data_gam_bacteria)
emm_pielou$metric="Pielou's"

emm_both=rbind(emm_richness,emm_shannon,emm_pielou)
emm_both$organism="Bacteria"

#Phages
df_alpha_all = vPOP_coverage_lifeStyle %>% group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(sp_obs=specnumber(meandepth),
            shannon=diversity(meandepth,index="shannon"),
            simpson=diversity(meandepth,index = "simpson"),
            n=sum(meandepth))

df_alpha_all = df_alpha_all %>% left_join(all_children[,c(1,2,3,4,6,7,8,9,17,18)],
                                               by = c("sample" = "accession"),keep=F)

df_alpha_all_lifeCycle = vPOP_coverage_lifeStyle %>% group_by(sample,replication_cycle) %>%
  summarise(sp_obs=specnumber(meandepth),
            shannon=diversity(meandepth,index="shannon"),
            simpson=diversity(meandepth,index = "simpson"),
            pielou=ifelse(sp_obs > 1, shannon / log(sp_obs), 0),
            n=sum(meandepth))

df_alpha_all_lifeCycle = df_alpha_all_lifeCycle %>% left_join(all_children[,c(1,2,3,4,6,7,8,9,17,19)],by = c("sample" = "accession"),keep=F)

df_alpha_all_lifeCycle = df_alpha_all_lifeCycle %>% left_join(read_mapp_dist,by=c("sample"="accession"))

#Temperate phages alpha diversity
data_gam=df_alpha_all_lifeCycle  %>% dplyr::filter(replication_cycle %in% c("Temperate"))
data_gam$subjectID.x=factor(data_gam$subjectID.x)
data_gam$trajectory=factor(data_gam$trajectory)

#GAM richness, Shannon, Simpson and Pielou's evenness
data_gam$sp_obs_scaled= scale(data_gam$sp_obs)
richness_gam <-  gam(sp_obs_scaled ~ trajectory + s(age,by=trajectory) + s(total_reads,bs="tp") + s(subjectID.x, bs = "re") , data = data_gam,method = "REML")
AIC(richness_gam)
summary(richness_gam)

data_gam$shannon_scaled= scale(data_gam$shannon)
shannon_gam <- gam(shannon_scaled  ~ trajectory + s(age,by=trajectory) + s(total_reads,bs="tp") + s(subjectID.x, bs = "re") , data = data_gam,method = "REML")
AIC(shannon_gam)
summary(shannon_gam)

data_gam$pielou_scaled = scale(data_gam$pielou)
pielou_gam <- gam(pielou_scaled  ~ trajectory +s(age,by=trajectory) + s(total_reads,bs="tp") + s(subjectID.x, bs = "re") , data = data_gam,method = "REML")
AIC(pielou_gam)
summary(pielou_gam)


# Define a range of ages to evaluate
age_range <- seq(min(data_gam$age), max(data_gam$age), length.out = 10)

emm_richness= emmeans_alpha(richness_gam,age_range,data_gam)
emm_richness$metric="Richness"
emm_shannon= emmeans_alpha(shannon_gam,age_range,data_gam)
emm_shannon$metric="Shannon"
emm_pielou= emmeans_alpha(pielou_gam,age_range,data_gam)
emm_pielou$metric="Pielou's"

emm_phages=rbind(emm_richness,emm_shannon,emm_pielou)
emm_phages$organism = "Temperate Phages"
emm_both = rbind(emm_both,emm_phages)
emm_both$metric = factor(emm_both$metric,levels=c("Shannon","Richness","Pielou's"))

pvalues_emms <- rbind(analyze_age_pairwise(shannon_gam, data_gam, age_range, "phages"),analyze_age_pairwise(gam_shannon_bacteria, data_gam_bacteria, age_range, "bacteria"))

write.csv(pvalues_emms,file="assets/pvalues_shannonEMMs.csv",quote = F)

summ_richness_bacteria = summary(gam_richness_bacteria)
summ_evenness_bacteria = summary(gam_evenness_bacteria)
summ_shannon_bacteria = summary(gam_shannon_bacteria)

dat_r2_AIC <- data.frame(r2 = c(round(summ_richness_bacteria$r.sq,digits = 2),round(summ_evenness_bacteria$r.sq,digits = 2), round(summ_shannon_bacteria$r.sq,digits = 2)), metric = c("Richness", "Pielou's", "Shannon"),dev=c(round(summ_richness_bacteria$dev.expl,digits = 2),round(summ_evenness_bacteria$dev.expl,digits = 2), round(summ_shannon_bacteria$dev.expl,digits = 2)))
dat_r2_AIC$label_r2 = paste("R^2 == ",dat_r2_AIC$r2,sep = " ")
dat_r2_AIC$label_dev = paste("Dev.Exp == ",dat_r2_AIC$dev,sep = " ")
dat_r2_AIC$metric = factor(dat_r2_AIC$metric,levels = c("Shannon","Richness", "Pielou's"))

alpha_healthy=ggplot(emm_both[emm_both$trajectory=="Consistent normal growth" & emm_both$organism=="Bacteria",], aes(x = age, y = emmean,group=metric)) + geom_line(size=1,color=colorblind_palette[1])+  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL),alpha=0.2,fill=colorblind_palette[1]) +
 labs(x = "Infant chronological age (days)",y = "GAM - EMMs (Z-Score)") +
  facet_wrap(~metric)+theme_classic(base_size = 30)+theme(strip.text = element_text(face="bold"),plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 10))+ scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 8)+geom_text(data  = dat_r2_AIC, mapping = aes(x = -Inf, y = 1.2, label = label_r2), hjust   = -0.1, vjust   = -1,parse = T)+geom_text(data  = dat_r2_AIC, mapping = aes(x = -Inf, y = 1.0, label = label_dev), hjust   = -0.1, vjust   = -1,parse = T)+labs(title="Bacterial communities alpha diversity")
alpha_healthy

summ_richness_p = summary(richness_gam)
summ_evenness_p = summary(pielou_gam)
summ_shannon_p = summary(shannon_gam)

dat_r2_AIC <- data.frame(r2 = c(round(summ_richness_p$r.sq,digits = 2),round(summ_evenness_p$r.sq,digits = 2), round(summ_shannon_p$r.sq,digits = 2)), metric = c("Richness", "Pielou's", "Shannon"),dev=c(round(summ_richness_p$dev.expl,digits = 2),round(summ_evenness_p$dev.expl,digits = 2), round(summ_shannon_p$dev.expl,digits = 2)))
dat_r2_AIC$label_r2 = paste("R^2 == ",dat_r2_AIC$r2,sep = " ")
dat_r2_AIC$label_dev = paste("Dev.Exp == ",dat_r2_AIC$dev,sep = " ")
dat_r2_AIC$metric = factor(dat_r2_AIC$metric,levels = c("Shannon","Richness", "Pielou's"))

alpha_healthy_p=ggplot(emm_both[emm_both$organism=="Temperate Phages" & emm_both$trajectory=="Consistent normal growth",], aes(x = age, y = emmean,group=metric)) + geom_line(size=1,color=colorblind_palette[1])+geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL),alpha=0.2,fill=colorblind_palette[1]) + labs(x = "Infant chronological age (days)", y = "GAM - EMMs (Z-Score)") +
  facet_wrap(~metric)+theme_classic(base_size = 30)+theme(strip.text = element_text(face="bold"),plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 10))+geom_text(data  = dat_r2_AIC, mapping = aes(x = -Inf, y = 0.8, label = label_r2), hjust   = -0.1, vjust   = -1,parse = T)+geom_text(data  = dat_r2_AIC, mapping = aes(x = -Inf, y = 0.6, label = label_dev), hjust   = -0.1, vjust   = -1,parse = T)+labs(title="Temperate phage communities alpha diversity")
alpha_healthy_p

alpha_comparing=ggplot(emm_both[emm_both$metric=="Shannon",], aes(x = age, y = emmean,color=trajectory,group=trajectory))+geom_line(size=1)+geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL),position = position_dodge(),alpha=0.6) +  scale_color_manual(values=colorblind_palette,name="",labels = function(x) str_wrap(x, width = 20))+ labs(x = "Infant chronological age (days)",y = "Shannon - EMM (Z-Score)") +
  facet_grid(~organism,scales = "free")+theme_classic(base_size = 30)+theme(plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 10),legend.text = element_text(lineheight = 0.8),legend.spacing.y = unit(2, "cm"),legend.box = "horizontal")+guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 1))
alpha_comparing
  

#Comparison real data scaled shannon. 
data_comparing= data.frame(sample=data_gam_bacteria$sample,shannon_bacteria=data_gam_bacteria$shannon_scaled)
data_comparing = data_comparing %>% left_join(data_gam[,c(1,20)],by="sample") 
names(data_comparing)[3]="shannon_temperate"

data_comparing = data_comparing %>% left_join(all_children,by=c("sample"="accession"))

#Age clusters 
set.seed(1208)
age_clusters=kmeans(data_comparing$age, 4)
data_comparing$cluster_age=age_clusters[["cluster"]]

clusters_order=data.frame(mean_age=age_clusters$centers,cluster=1:length(age_clusters$centers))
clusters_order$age_range=c("12-73","395-626","78-159","170-385")
clusters_order$age_range=factor(clusters_order$age_range,levels=c("12-73","78-159","170-385","395-626"))

data_comparing= data_comparing %>% left_join(clusters_order,by=c("cluster_age"="cluster"))

data_comparing = data_comparing[,c("sample","age","shannon_bacteria","shannon_temperate","age_range","trajectory")]

data_comparing_Healthy = data_comparing[data_comparing$trajectory =="Consistent normal growth",]
data_comparing_melt=reshape2::melt(data_comparing_Healthy,id.vars = c("sample","age","age_range","trajectory"),measure.vars = c("shannon_bacteria","shannon_temperate"))

shannon_organisms = ggplot(data_comparing_melt,aes(x=age_range,y=value,colour = variable))+
  geom_boxplot(alpha=0.5,size=0.5,position = position_dodge())+
  geom_jitter(size=0.7,position = position_jitterdodge()) +
  scale_color_manual(labels = c("Bacteria","Temperate Phages"),values = organism_palette)+ xlab("Infant chronological age bins (days)")+ylab("Shannon (Z-score)")+stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", label = "p.signif",label.y = 2.5,size=7,hide.ns = T)+labs(color="")+theme_classic(base_size = 30)+theme(plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 10))

#theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 15,face="bold"),legend.text = element_text(size = 15), legend.title = element_text(size = 15),plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 10))

alpha_metrics = plot_grid(alpha_healthy_p,alpha_healthy,shannon_organisms,alpha_comparing,ncol = 1,labels = c("A","B","C","D"),rel_heights = c(0.25,0.25,0.25,0.25),align = "h",axis = "lr",label_size = 24)

ggsave(alpha_metrics,filename = "assets/alpha.png",device = "png",width=700,height = 700,unit="mm")

```

## Maturation curves

### Bacteria

```{r}
#| message: false
set.seed(1208)

infants_healthy = all_children$subjectID.x[all_children$trajectory == "Consistent normal growth"]
sampled_infants <- sample(unique(infants_healthy),size = length(unique(infants_healthy))*0.8)

sampled_timepoints=all_children[which(all_children$subjectID.x %in% sampled_infants),"age"]

sampling_train = data.frame(subjectID.x=sampled_infants,set="train")
sampling_train = all_children %>% select(subjectID.x,age) %>% left_join(sampling_train,by="subjectID.x") %>% mutate(set  = replace_na(set, "test"))

ggplot(sampling_train,aes(x=age))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 50)+theme_classic()
ggplot(sampling_train,aes(x=age))+geom_histogram(binwidth = 50)+facet_wrap(~set) + theme_classic()

predictors = profile_metadata %>% ungroup() %>% select(starts_with("s__")) %>% names

list_datasets_bacteria = selectDatasets(profile_metadata,sampled_infants,predictors)
df_importance_bact = feature_selection(list_datasets_bacteria[[1]],predictors)

#### Healthy maturation model #### 
mat_bact_heatmap=plots_maturation(df_importance_bact,list_datasets_bacteria$train_healthy)
mat_bacteria_train_test = normal_growth_maturation(train_df = list_datasets_bacteria$train_healthy,
                                          predictors = df_importance_bact$species,
                                          test_df_allTrajectories = list_datasets_bacteria$test_all,
                                          organism = "Bacteria")
```

### Viral Clusters

```{r}
#| message: false

#### vOTUS abundance  matrix 
vPOP_matrix=read.csv("data/processed/vOTU_abundance_matrix.csv",h=T)
# ONLY 23679 vOTUs WERE PRESENT IN THE SAMPLES, AFTER FILTERING OF THE MAPPED READS STATS
vPOP_matrix=vPOP_matrix[,-1]
vPOP_matrix$contig=factor(vPOP_matrix$contig)
rownames(vPOP_matrix)=vPOP_matrix$contig
vPOP_matrix=vPOP_matrix[,-1]

#Remove samples with a total coverage less than 1000.
to_filter = vPOP_coverage %>% group_by(sample) %>% summarize(total=sum(meandepth)) %>% arrange(total) %>% filter(total < 1000)

#to_filter %>% left_join(children_0_300,by = c("sample"="accession"))
vPOP_matrix = vPOP_matrix[,-which(names(vPOP_matrix) %in% to_filter$sample)]
vPOP_matrix = vPOP_matrix[,which(names(vPOP_matrix) %in% unique(all_children$accession))]

#remove contigs with abundance equal to 0.
remove_vTOUs=rownames(vPOP_matrix)[rowSums(vPOP_matrix) == 0]

vPOP_matrix = vPOP_matrix[-which(rownames(vPOP_matrix) %in% remove_vTOUs),]

vPOP_matrix=t(vPOP_matrix)
vPOP_matrix=as.matrix(vPOP_matrix)
class(vPOP_matrix)
vPOP_matrix[is.na(vPOP_matrix)] = 0

#All vPOPs Maturation
vPOP_df_all = data.frame(vPOP_matrix)
names(vPOP_df_all)=colnames(vPOP_matrix)
vPOP_df_all$sample=rownames(vPOP_df_all)

vPOP_df_all = vPOP_df_all %>% left_join(all_children[,c(1,2,3,4,6,7,8,9,17,19)],
                                               by = c("sample" = "accession"))

temperate_contigs=vPOP_coverage_lifeStyle %>% select(contig,replication_cycle) %>% distinct() %>% filter(replication_cycle=="Temperate") %>% pull(contig)

vPOP_df_temperate = vPOP_df_all[,colnames(vPOP_df_all) %in% c(temperate_contigs,"sample","age","subjectID.x","trajectory")]

#### viral cluster assignment 
viral_family_cluster=read.table("data/processed/viral_cluster_assignment.csv",h=T)

viral_family_cluster = viral_family_cluster[which(viral_family_cluster$genome %in% names(vPOP_df_temperate)),]

viral_family_cluster$best_taxonomy_corrected = ifelse(viral_family_cluster$best_taxonomy=="<NA>",paste("singleton_",viral_family_cluster$genome,sep=""),viral_family_cluster$best_taxonomy)

cluster_list= split(viral_family_cluster$genome, viral_family_cluster$best_taxonomy_corrected)

viral_cluster_df <- as.data.frame(lapply(cluster_list, function(cols) {
  rowSums(vPOP_df_temperate[, cols, drop = FALSE])
}))

viral_cluster_df <- cbind(vPOP_df_temperate[, c("sample", "age","subjectID.x","trajectory")], viral_cluster_df)

clusters = viral_cluster_df %>% select(-sample,-age,-subjectID.x,-trajectory) %>% names() 

NumberInfants = length(unique(viral_cluster_df$subjectID.x))
vc_prevalence_df = viral_cluster_df %>% pivot_longer(cols=clusters,names_to = "VC",values_to="rel.abund")  %>% ungroup() %>% filter(rel.abund != 0) %>% group_by(VC) %>% summarize(prevalence = n_distinct(subjectID.x)/NumberInfants, .groups = "drop") %>%  mutate(category_prevalence = case_when(prevalence >= 0.7 ~ "Common", prevalence < 0.2 ~ "Rare", TRUE ~ "Moderate")) %>% mutate(category_prevalence = factor(category_prevalence, levels = c("Rare", "Moderate", "Common")))

label_counts <- vc_prevalence_df %>%  add_count(category_prevalence) %>%  mutate(prevalence_label = paste0(category_prevalence, " (n=", n, ")"))

label_counts$prevalence_label <- factor(
  label_counts$prevalence_label,
  levels = unlist(lapply(c("Rare", "Moderate", "Common"), function(pat) {
    unique(label_counts$prevalence_label[grep(pat, label_counts$prevalence_label)])
  }))
)

prevalence_plot_vc=ggplot(label_counts, aes(x = prevalence, fill = prevalence_label)) +
    geom_bar() + theme_bw() + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = prevalence_palette,name = "",
                    labels = function(x) str_replace(x, " \\(", "\\\n\\(")) +
    scale_y_sqrt() +
    xlab("Prevalence") +
    ylab("No. of Temperate VCs") +
    ggtitle(paste("Prevalence Distribution")) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 20) +
     theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.key.width = unit(3, "cm"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 12,lineheight = 0.8),legend.position = "top",
      legend.spacing.x = unit(1, "cm"),
      title = element_text(size = 14))+
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1, label.position = "top",byrow = TRUE))

#prevalence_plot_vc
#ggsave(prevalence_plot_vc,filename = assets/prevalence_VC_Temp.png",device = "png",width=300,height = 200,unit="mm",dpi=300)


viral_cluster_to_PHF = viral_family_cluster %>% left_join(host_pred_split, by = c("genome"="Virus"))
viral_cluster_to_PHF$best_taxonomy_new = gsub("[:|]", ".", viral_cluster_to_PHF$best_taxonomy_corrected)
viral_cluster_VC_to_PHF = viral_cluster_to_PHF %>% mutate(VC_ID = paste0("VC", match(best_taxonomy_new, unique(best_taxonomy_new)))) %>% distinct()

viral_cluster_to_VC = viral_cluster_VC_to_PHF[,c(13,14)] %>% distinct()
change_names_df=data.frame(Tax=names(viral_cluster_df))
change_names_df = change_names_df %>% left_join(viral_cluster_to_VC,by=c("Tax"="best_taxonomy_new"))

names(viral_cluster_df)[-c(1,2,3,4)] = change_names_df$VC_ID[-c(1,2,3,4)]


predictors_VC= viral_cluster_df %>% select(starts_with("VC")) %>% names()
list_datasets_temperate = selectDatasets(viral_cluster_df,sampled_infants,predictors_VC)

df_importance_VC = feature_selection(list_datasets_temperate$train_healthy,predictors_VC)

#### Healthy maturation model #### 
mat_temperate_heatmap=plots_maturation(df_importance_VC,list_datasets_temperate$train_healthy)

#Remove samples were important VCs were always 0 in train and test sets. 
train_filtered = list_datasets_temperate$train_healthy
to_keep=train_filtered %>% select(df_importance_VC$species) %>% rowSums()!=0
train_filtered=train_filtered[to_keep,]

test_all_filtered = list_datasets_temperate$test_all
to_keep=test_all_filtered %>% select(df_importance_VC$species) %>% rowSums()!=0
test_all_filtered=test_all_filtered[to_keep,]

mat_temperate_train_test = normal_growth_maturation(train_df = train_filtered,
                                                   predictors = df_importance_VC$species,
                                                   test_df_allTrajectories = test_all_filtered,
                                                   organism = "Temperate Phages")

```

#### Plots maturation normal growth

```{r}
#Plots

df_vc_phf = viral_cluster_VC_to_PHF %>% filter(VC_ID %in% df_importance_VC$species) %>% group_by(family,VC_ID) %>% summarise(No_vOTUs=n_distinct(genome))

df_vc_phf$family = factor(df_vc_phf$family,levels=c("Bacteroidaceae","Lachnospiraceae","Ruminococcaceae","Enterobacteriaceae","Erysipelotrichaceae","Bifidobacteriaceae","Lactobacillaceae","Selenomonadaceae")) 

plot_vc_phf=ggplot(df_vc_phf,aes(x=reorder(VC_ID,as.numeric(factor(family))),y=No_vOTUs,fill=family))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+scale_fill_manual(values=cbPalette_hosts)+theme_classic(base_size = 15)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90))+labs(fill="PHF")+xlab("")+scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 4)

newdata = rbind(mat_bacteria_train_test[[1]],mat_temperate_train_test[[1]])
predictions_healthy = rbind(mat_bacteria_train_test[[2]],mat_temperate_train_test[[2]])

data_r2 = data.frame(organism=c("Bacteria","Temperate Phages"),r2=c(r2_label(mat_bacteria_train_test[[2]],"Bacteria"),r2_label(mat_temperate_train_test[[2]],"Phages")))

plot_maturation_healthy = ggplot()+geom_line(data= newdata, aes(x = age, y = pred_age, linetype = organism),color = colorblind_palette[1], size = 1.2) +
    labs(x = "Infant chronological age", y = "Microbiome age") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 30)+scale_color_manual(values=colorblind_palette,name="")+ geom_point(data=predictions_healthy,aes(x=age,y=pred_age,shape=organism),color = colorblind_palette[1])+ scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.1))+scale_shape_manual(values = c(16,0))+geom_abline(slope = 1,intercept = 0)+geom_text(data= data_r2, aes(x = 0, y = 480, label = r2), hjust   = -0.1, vjust   = -1,parse = T)+facet_wrap(~organism)+theme(legend.position = "top",legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"))+labs(shape="",linetype="")
plot_maturation_healthy

#plot_VC_maturation_healthy_weaning = mat_temperate_train_test[[6]]

VC_abund_melt = list_datasets_temperate[[1]] %>% pivot_longer(cols=starts_with("VC"),names_to = "VC_ID",values_to = "rel.abund_temp") %>% arrange(sample,age)

BC_abund_melt = list_datasets_bacteria[[1]] %>% filter(sample %in% VC_abund_melt$sample) %>% pivot_longer(cols=starts_with("s__"),names_to = "Bacterial_Species",values_to = "rel.abund_bact") %>% arrange(sample,age)

clean_bac_species = BC_abund_melt$Bacterial_Species %>% str_remove("^s__") %>% str_replace_all("_", " ")

fam2species <- viral_cluster_VC_to_PHF %>% filter(species %in% clean_bac_species) %>% select(family,species)

#REVIEW HOW MANY ARE LOST HERE ! 
fam2species = fam2species %>% distinct()

imp_clusters = df_importance_VC$species

PHF = viral_cluster_VC_to_PHF %>% filter(VC_ID %in% imp_clusters) %>% select(family) %>% distinct() %>% pull()

species_in_impPHF = fam2species %>% filter(family %in% PHF) %>% distinct()
species_in_impPHF$species_bac = species_in_impPHF$species %>% str_replace_all("^", "s__") %>% str_replace_all(" ","_") 

#REVIEW HOW MANY ARE LOST HERE ! 
BC_abund_melt_speciesin_impPHF = BC_abund_melt %>% filter(BC_abund_melt$Bacterial_Species %in% species_in_impPHF$species_bac) %>% left_join(species_in_impPHF,by=c("Bacterial_Species"="species_bac"))

imp_VC_to_PHF = viral_cluster_VC_to_PHF %>% filter(VC_ID %in% imp_clusters) %>% select(family,VC_ID) %>% distinct()

impVC_abund_melt_phf= VC_abund_melt %>% filter(VC_ID %in% imp_clusters) %>% left_join(imp_VC_to_PHF,by="VC_ID")

Abund_VC_bacFam = BC_abund_melt_speciesin_impPHF %>% group_by(sample,age,family) %>% summarise(rel.abund_bact_fam = sum(rel.abund_bact)) %>% left_join(impVC_abund_melt_phf,by=c("sample","age","family")) %>% ungroup()

Abund_VC_bacFam %>% group_by(VC_ID) %>% mutate(cor_bac_vc = cor(rel.abund_bact_fam,rel.abund_temp))

#mean relative abundance of bacterial family in sample.
mean_relab_bac_persample = Abund_VC_bacFam %>% select(-age) %>% pivot_wider(id_cols = sample,names_from = family,values_from = rel.abund_bact_fam,values_fn = mean) %>% arrange(sample)

mean_relab_VC_persample =  Abund_VC_bacFam %>% select(-age) %>% pivot_wider(id_cols = sample,names_from = VC_ID,values_from = rel.abund_temp,values_fn = mean) %>% arrange(sample)

corM = cor(mean_relab_bac_persample[,-1],mean_relab_VC_persample[,-1],method = "kendall")

cor_df = as.data.frame(corM) %>% rownames_to_column("Family") %>% pivot_longer(cols = -Family,names_to = "VC_ID",values_to = "kendall_cor") %>% left_join(imp_VC_to_PHF,by="VC_ID") %>% rename(host=family)

row_order <- hclust(dist(corM))$order
col_order <- hclust(dist(t(corM)))$order

cor_df <- cor_df %>%mutate(Family = factor(Family, levels = rownames(corM)[row_order]),
         VC_ID = factor(VC_ID, levels = colnames(corM)[col_order]),
         host = factor(host, levels = levels(Family)))

plot_correlation_vc_bacFam = ggplot(cor_df,aes(x=VC_ID,y=Family,fill=kendall_cor))+geom_tile()+theme_classic(base_size = 27)+scale_fill_distiller(palette = "BrBG", limit = c(-1, 1))+labs(x="",y="",fill = expression(paste("",tau)))+facet_grid(.~ host, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x")+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,vjust=0.5),strip.text = element_text(face = "italic",angle = 90,size=15),panel.spacing = unit(0.1, "lines"),legend.position = "right",legend.key.width = unit(0.3,"cm"))+guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title.vjust = 0.8,title.hjust = 0.1,barwidth = 1))


Abund_VC_bacFam_melted = Abund_VC_bacFam %>% pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("rel.abund"),names_to = "organism",values_to = "rel.abund") %>% group_by(VC_ID,organism) %>% mutate(scaled_rel_abund = scale(rel.abund)) %>% mutate(age_bins = cut(age, breaks = seq(0, 650, by = 50), right = FALSE)) %>% group_by(age_bins,family,VC_ID,organism) %>% mutate(mean_relabund=mean(rel.abund))

p1= Abund_VC_bacFam %>% pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("rel.abund"), names_to = "organism",
    values_to = "rel.abund") %>% mutate(age_bins = cut(age, breaks = seq(0, 650, by = 50), right = FALSE)) %>%  group_by(age_bins, family, VC_ID, organism) %>% summarise(mean_relabund = mean(rel.abund, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%  group_by(VC_ID, organism) %>% mutate(scaled_rel_abund = as.numeric(scale(mean_relabund))) %>% ungroup() %>% mutate(family = factor(family, levels = levels(cor_df$Family)), VC_ID = factor(VC_ID, levels = levels(cor_df$VC_ID))) %>% ggplot(aes(x = age_bins, y = organism, fill = scaled_rel_abund)) +  geom_tile() + scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", name = "Mean Rel.Abund") + facet_wrap(family~VC_ID,ncol = 3) + theme_classic(base_size = 30) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1))

ggsave(p1,filename = "assets/plot_bac_vc_abund.png",device = "png",width=600,height = 600,unit="mm")

VC_mat_comparison_ab = plot_grid(plot_maturation_healthy,plot_correlation_vc_bacFam,ncol = 2, labels = c("A","B"),rel_widths = c(0.5, 0.5),align = "h",axis = "lrtb",label_size = 24)

VC_mat_comparison_cd = plot_grid(ggdraw(mat_bact_heatmap[[2]]$gtable)+theme_classic(base_size = 25),ggdraw(mat_temperate_heatmap[[2]]$gtable)+theme_classic(base_size = 25),ncol = 2, labels = c("C","D"),rel_widths = c(0.6, 0.4),align = "h",axis = "lrtb",label_size = 24)

VC_mat_comparison = plot_grid(VC_mat_comparison_ab,VC_mat_comparison_cd,ncol = 1,rel_heights = c(0.4,0.6),align = "h",axis = "lrtb")
ggsave(VC_mat_comparison,filename = "assets/NormalGrowth_maturation.png",device = "png",width=600,height = 800,unit="mm")

R2_plots = plot_grid(mat_bact_heatmap[[1]],mat_temperate_heatmap[[1]],ncol = 2,labels = c("A","B"),rel_widths = c(0.5,0.5),align = "h",axis = "lrtb",label_size = 20)
ggsave(R2_plots,filename = "assets/R2_plots.png",device = "png",width=400,height = 300,unit="mm")

```

#### OLD - Correlation VCs with bacteria

```{r}
#CORRELATION WITH BACTERIA


VC_mat_comparison = plot_grid(VC_mat_comparison_ab,VC_mat_comparison_cd,ncol = 1,rel_heights = c(0.2,0.6,0.2),align = "h",axis = "lrtb")
#ggsave(VC_mat_comparison,filename = "assets/NormalGrowth_maturation.png",device = "png",width=600,height = 800,unit="mm")

#ggsave(VC_mat_comparison,filename = "assets/NormalGrowth_microdiv.png",device = "png",width=600,height = 800,unit="mm")


imp_vOTU_abundance = vPOP_df_temperate[vPOP_df_temperate$trajectory == "Consistent normal growth",colnames(vPOP_df_temperate)%in% c(df_importance_VC$species,"sample")]

imp_bact_abundance = vOTU_nucl_div_df[vOTU_nucl_div_df$trajectory == "Consistent normal growth",colnames(vOTU_nucl_div_df)%in% c(df_importance_bac$species,"sample")]

common_samples = intersect(impNucl_vOTU_abundance$sample,impNucl_vOTU_nuclDiv$sample)

impNucl_vOTU_abundance = impNucl_vOTU_abundance[impNucl_vOTU_abundance$sample %in% common_samples,] %>% arrange(sample)

impNucl_vOTU_nuclDiv = impNucl_vOTU_nuclDiv[impNucl_vOTU_nuclDiv$sample %in% common_samples,] %>% arrange(sample)

impNucl_vOTU_abundance_reORD <- impNucl_vOTU_abundance[, match(colnames(impNucl_vOTU_nuclDiv), colnames(impNucl_vOTU_abundance))]

mat_corr = cor(impNucl_vOTU_abundance_reORD[,-1],impNucl_vOTU_nuclDiv[,-1])
corrplot::corrplot(mat_corr,tl.pos = "n")



dataset_temp = list_datasets_temperate$train_healthy %>% select(sample,df_importance_VC$species) %>% filter(rowSums(select(.,df_importance_VC$species))!=0)

dataset_temp_melt = melt(dataset_temp)
names(dataset_temp_melt)=c("sample","VC_ID","rel.abund")

VC_to_PHF = viral_cluster_VC_to_PHF[,c("family","VC_ID")] %>% distinct()
dataset_temp_melt = dataset_temp_melt %>% left_join(VC_to_PHF,by="VC_ID")

dataset_bact = list_datasets_bacteria$train_healthy %>% select(sample,df_importance_bact$species) %>% filter(rowSums(select(.,df_importance_bact$species))!=0)

dataset_bact_melt = melt(dataset_bact)
names(dataset_bact_melt)=c("sample","species","rel.abund")

fam2species = read.table("data/raw/bact_species2fam.txt",h=F,sep = " ")
names(fam2species) = c("family","species")
fam2species$family = gsub("f__","",fam2species$family)
fam2species = fam2species %>% distinct()

dataset_bact_melt = dataset_bact_melt %>% left_join(fam2species,by = "species")

bac_family <- dataset_bact_melt %>% group_by(sample, family) %>% summarise(bact_rel_Abund = sum(rel.abund)) %>% pivot_wider(names_from = family, values_from = bact_rel_Abund, values_fill = 0)

vc_phf <- dataset_temp_melt %>% group_by(sample, family) %>% summarise(vc_rel_Abund = sum(rel.abund)) %>% pivot_wider(names_from = family, values_from = vc_rel_Abund, values_fill = 0)

common_samples = intersect(bac_family$sample,vc_phf$sample)
bac_sorted <- bac_family %>% filter(sample %in% common_samples) %>% arrange(sample)
vc_sorted  <- vc_phf %>% filter(sample %in% common_samples) %>% arrange(sample)

families_shared = intersect(colnames(vc_sorted),colnames(bac_sorted))[-1]
names(bac_sorted)
cor_matrix <- cor(bac_sorted[,-1], vc_sorted[,-1], method = "spearman")
cor_melted <- melt(cor_matrix)
colnames(cor_melted) <- c("Bac_Family", "VC_ID", "Rho")

ggplot(cor_melted, aes(x = VC_ID, y = Bac_Family, fill = Rho)) +
  geom_tile() +
  # Use your mustard yellow aesthetic for the high correlations
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#0D1B2A", mid = "white", high = "#C5A059", 
                       midpoint = 0, name = "Spearman\nRho") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5),
        panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(x = "Viral Clusters (VCs)",y = "Bacterial Families")

cor_results <- data.frame(Family = character(), Spearman_r = numeric())
for(i in families_shared){
    r_val <- cor(vc_sorted[[i]], bac_sorted[[i]], method = "spearman")
    cor_results <- rbind(cor_results, data.frame(Family = i, Spearman_r = r_val))
}

# Clean up family names (removing the '_VC' or 's__' prefixes if necessary)
cor_results$Family <- gsub("s__|__VC", "", cor_results$Family)
cor_results$Family = factor(cor_results$Family,levels=c("Bacteroidaceae","Lachnospiraceae","Ruminococcaceae","Enterobacteriaceae","Erysipelotrichaceae","Bifidobacteriaceae","Lactobacillaceae","Selenomonadaceae")) 

plot_correlation = ggplot(cor_results, aes(x = reorder(Family, Spearman_r), y = Spearman_r,color = Family)) +
    geom_segment(aes(xend = Family, yend = 0), color = "black") +
    geom_point(size = 4)+
    coord_flip() + theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
    labs(y = "Spearman Correlation (r)",x="") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red")+
  scale_color_manual(values=cbPalette_hosts)
plot_correlation

```

#### Across Trajectories - maturation

```{r}
mat_bacteria_train_test = normal_growth_maturation(train_df = list_datasets_bacteria$train_healthy,
                                                   predictors = df_importance_bact$species,
                                                   test_df_allTrajectories = list_datasets_bacteria$test_all,
                                                   organism = "Bacteria")

mat_temperate_train_test = normal_growth_maturation(train_df = train_filtered,
                                                    predictors = df_importance_VC$species,
                                                    test_df_allTrajectories = test_all_filtered,
                                                    organism = "Temperate Phages")

trajectories_comparison = plot_grid(mat_bacteria_train_test[[7]],mat_temperate_train_test[[7]],ncol = 2,rel_widths = c(0.5,0.5),align = "h",axis = "lrtb",labels = c("A","B"),label_size = 24)
#ggsave(trajectories_comparison,filename = "assets/trajectories_comparison.png",device = "png",width=500,height = 210,unit="mm")
```

### viral microdiversity

```{r}

vOTU_nucl_div=read.table("data/processed/vOTU_nucl_div_instrain_filtered.txt",h=F,sep=",")

names(vOTU_nucl_div) = c("sample","scaffold","length","coverage","breadth","nucl_diversity","coverage_median","coverage_std","coverage_SEM","breadth_minCov","breadth_expected","nucl_diversity_median","nucl_diversity_rarefied","nucl_diversity_rarefied_median","breadth_rarefied","conANI_reference","popANI_reference","SNS_count","SNV_count","divergent_site_count","population_divergent_sites","consensus_divergent_sites")

vOTU_nucl_div = vOTU_nucl_div %>% filter(breadth>=0.5 & sample %in% unique(vPOP_df_all$sample)) 

temperate_contigs=vPOP_coverage_lifeStyle %>% select(contig,replication_cycle) %>% distinct() %>% filter(replication_cycle=="Temperate") %>% pull(contig)

#Do I want to do it at the vOTU or VC level
vOTU_nucl_VC_df = vOTU_nucl_div[vOTU_nucl_div$scaffold %in%temperate_contigs,c("sample","scaffold","nucl_diversity")] %>% left_join(viral_cluster_VC_to_PHF,by = c("scaffold" = "genome")) 

vOTU_nucl_VC_filt_imp_df = vOTU_nucl_VC_df %>% filter(VC_ID %in% df_importance_VC$species) %>% droplevels()

vOTU_nucl_VC_filt_imp_df$family = factor(vOTU_nucl_VC_filt_imp_df$family,levels=c("Bacteroidaceae","Lachnospiraceae","Ruminococcaceae","Enterobacteriaceae","Erysipelotrichaceae","Bifidobacteriaceae","Lactobacillaceae","Selenomonadaceae")) 

plot_nucl_variation = vOTU_nucl_VC_filt_imp_df  %>% ggplot(aes(x=reorder(scaffold,as.numeric(factor(family))),y=(nucl_diversity),color=family))+geom_boxplot()+geom_point(alpha=0.5)+theme_classic(base_size = 30)+theme(axis.text.x  = element_blank())+ylab("Nucleotide Diversity (Log10)")+xlab("vOTUs")+scale_y_log10()+scale_color_manual(values=cbPalette_hosts)+labs(color="")
plot_nucl_variation

vOTU_nucl_div_toMatrix = vOTU_nucl_div %>% select(sample,scaffold,nucl_diversity) %>% filter(scaffold %in% temperate_contigs)

vOTU_nucl_div_Matrix <- vOTU_nucl_div_toMatrix %>% pivot_wider(names_from = scaffold, values_from = nucl_diversity,values_fill = 0)

rownames(vOTU_nucl_div_Matrix) = vOTU_nucl_div_Matrix$sample
vOTU_nucl_div_df = vOTU_nucl_div_Matrix %>% left_join(all_children[,c("accession","age","subjectID.x","trajectory")],by = c("sample" = "accession")) %>% drop_na()

predictors_nucl = vOTU_nucl_div_df %>% select(-sample,-age,-subjectID.x,-trajectory) %>% names()
list_datasets_microdiv<-  selectDatasets(vOTU_nucl_div_df,sampled_infants,predictors_nucl)

df_importance_nucl = feature_selection(list_datasets_microdiv$train_healthy,predictors_nucl)

#### Healthy maturation model #### 
mat_temp_nucl_heatmap=plots_maturation(df_importance_nucl,list_datasets_microdiv$train_healthy)
#Supp Figure 6
mat_temp_nucl_heatmap[[1]]

#Remove samples were important vOTU microdiversity was always 0 in train and test sets. 
train_filtered = list_datasets_microdiv$train_healthy
to_keep=train_filtered %>% select(df_importance_nucl$species) %>% rowSums()!=0
train_filtered=train_filtered[to_keep,]

test_all_filtered = list_datasets_microdiv$test_all
to_keep=test_all_filtered %>% select(df_importance_nucl$species) %>% rowSums()!=0
test_all_filtered=test_all_filtered[to_keep,]


mat_temp_nucl_train_test = normal_growth_maturation(train_df = train_filtered,
                                                   predictors = df_importance_nucl$species,
                                                   test_df_allTrajectories = test_all_filtered,
                                                   organism = "Temperate Phages NuclDiv")


newdata = rbind(mat_temperate_train_test[[1]],mat_temp_nucl_train_test[[1]])
predictions_healthy = rbind(mat_temperate_train_test[[2]],mat_temp_nucl_train_test[[2]])
newdata$organism=ifelse(newdata$organism=="Temperate Phages NuclDiv","Nucleotide Diversity","Abundance")
newdata$organism=factor(newdata$organism,levels = c("Nucleotide Diversity","Abundance"))
predictions_healthy$organism=ifelse(predictions_healthy$organism=="Temperate Phages NuclDiv","Nucleotide Diversity","Abundance")
predictions_healthy$organism=factor(predictions_healthy$organism,levels = levels(newdata$organism))

plot_maturation_temperate = ggplot()+geom_line(data= newdata, aes(x = age, y = pred_age, linetype = organism),color = colorblind_palette[1], size = 1.2) +
    labs(x = "Infant chronological age", y = "Virome age") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 30)+scale_color_manual(values=colorblind_palette,name="")+ geom_point(data=predictions_healthy,aes(x=age,y=pred_age,shape=organism),color = colorblind_palette[1])+ scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.1))+scale_shape_manual(values = c(16,0))+geom_abline(slope = 1,intercept = 0)+annotate("text",x=12,y=540,label = r2_label(mat_temperate_train_test[[2]],"Abundance"),parse=T,size=7,hjust=0)+annotate("text",x=12,y=490,label = r2_label(mat_temp_nucl_train_test[[2]],"Nucl_diversity"),parse=T,size=7,hjust=0)+theme(legend.position = "top",legend.key.width = unit(3, "cm"))+labs(shape="",linetype="")
plot_maturation_temperate

VC_mat_comparison_ab = plot_grid(plot_nucl_variation,plot_maturation_temperate,ncol = 2, labels = c("A","B"),rel_widths = c(0.5, 0.5),rel_heights = c(0.3,0.7),align = "h",axis = "lrtb")

vOTU_nucldiv_melt = list_datasets_microdiv[[1]] %>% select(all_of(df_importance_nucl$species),sample,age) %>% pivot_longer(cols=all_of(df_importance_nucl$species),names_to = "vOTU",values_to = "nucl.div_vOTU") %>% arrange(sample,age)

vOTU_abund_melt = vPOP_df_all %>% filter(sample %in% list_datasets_microdiv[[1]]$sample) %>% select(all_of(df_importance_nucl$species),sample,age) %>% pivot_longer(cols=all_of(df_importance_nucl$species),names_to = "vOTU",values_to = "rel.abund_vOTU") %>% arrange(sample,age)


vOTU_abund_nuclDiv = vOTU_nucldiv_melt %>% left_join(vOTU_abund_melt,by=c("sample","age","vOTU")) %>% ungroup()

vOTU_abund_nuclDiv %>% group_by(vOTU) %>% mutate(cor_abund_nucl = cor(nucl.div_vOTU,rel.abund_vOTU))

#mean relative abundance of bacterial family in sample.
mean_relAbund_persample = vOTU_abund_nuclDiv %>% select(-age) %>% pivot_wider(id_cols = sample,names_from = vOTU,values_from = rel.abund_vOTU,values_fn = mean) %>% arrange(sample)

mean_nuclDiv_persample =  vOTU_abund_nuclDiv %>% select(-age) %>% pivot_wider(id_cols = sample,names_from = vOTU,values_from = nucl.div_vOTU,values_fn = mean) %>% arrange(sample)

corM_phages = cor(mean_relAbund_persample[,-1],mean_nuclDiv_persample[,-1],method = "kendall",use="complete.obs")

cor_df_phages = as.data.frame(corM_phages) %>% rownames_to_column("vOTU_Abundance") %>% pivot_longer(cols = -vOTU_Abundance,names_to = "vOTU_Nucl_Diversity",values_to = "kendall_cor") # %>% left_join(imp_VC_to_PHF,by="VC_ID") %>% rename(host=family)


df_vOTUname2number = data.frame(vOTU_ID=paste("vOTU",seq(1:nrow(mat_temp_nucl_heatmap[[3]])),sep=""),vOTU=rownames(mat_temp_nucl_heatmap[[3]]))

clusters_k3 <- cutree(mat_temp_nucl_heatmap[[2]]$tree_row, k = 3) %>% enframe(name = "vOTU", value = "cluster_phase")

plot_correlation_abund_nucl = cor_df_phages %>% filter(!is.na(kendall_cor)) %>% left_join(clusters_k3, by = c("vOTU_Nucl_Diversity"="vOTU")) %>% mutate(phase=case_when(cluster_phase == 1 ~ "pre-weaning",cluster_phase == 2 ~ "early post-weaning",.default = "late post-weaning")) %>% mutate(phase=factor(phase,levels = c("pre-weaning","early post-weaning","late post-weaning"))) %>% left_join(df_vOTUname2number,by=c("vOTU_Abundance"="vOTU")) %>% left_join(clusters_k3, by = c("vOTU_Nucl_Diversity"="vOTU"))%>% left_join(df_vOTUname2number,by=c("vOTU_Nucl_Diversity"="vOTU")) %>% mutate(vOTU_ID.y=factor(vOTU_ID.y,levels=paste("vOTU",mat_temp_nucl_heatmap[[2]]$tree_row$order,sep="")),vOTU_ID.x=factor(vOTU_ID.x,levels=paste("vOTU",mat_temp_nucl_heatmap[[2]]$tree_row$order,sep="")))%>% ggplot(aes(x=vOTU_ID.y,y=vOTU_ID.x,fill=kendall_cor))+geom_tile()+theme_classic(base_size = 27)+scale_fill_distiller(palette = "BrBG", limit = c(-1, 1))+labs(x="",y="",fill = expression(paste("",tau)))+facet_wrap(~phase,scales = "free_x")+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,vjust=0.5),legend.position = "right",legend.key.width = unit(0.3,"cm"))+guides(fill = guide_colorbar(title.vjust = 0.8,title.hjust = 0.1,barwidth = 1))
plot_correlation_abund_nucl

ggsave(plot_correlation_abund_nucl,filename = "assets/correlationAbundND.png",device = "png",width=420,height = 300,unit="mm")


groups = list(c("pre-weaning","early post-weaning"),c("pre-weaning","late post-weaning"),c("early post-weaning","late post-weaning"))
plot_early_vs_late = vOTU_abund_nuclDiv %>% left_join(clusters_k3, by = "vOTU") %>% mutate(phase=case_when(cluster_phase == 1 ~ "pre-weaning",cluster_phase == 2 ~ "early post-weaning",.default = "late post-weaning"))  %>% mutate(phase=factor(phase,levels = c("pre-weaning","early post-weaning","late post-weaning"))) %>% select(nucl.div_vOTU,phase) %>% ggplot(aes(x=phase,y=nucl.div_vOTU))+geom_boxplot(alpha=0.7)+geom_jitter(alpha=0.5)+stat_compare_means(comparisons = groups ,method = "wilcox.test",label = "p.signif",na.rm = T,hide.ns = T) +scale_y_log10()+theme_classic(base_size = 27)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,vjust=0.5,hjust=1))+labs(x="",y="Log10 scaled Nucleotide Diversity")
plot_early_vs_late




#corrplot::corrplot(corM)

#Abund_VC_bacFam_melted = Abund_VC_bacFam %>% pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("rel.abund"),names_to = "organism",values_to = "rel.abund") %>% group_by(VC_ID,organism) %>% mutate(scaled_rel_abund = scale(rel.abund)) %>% mutate(age_bins = cut(age, breaks = seq(0, 650, by = 50), right = FALSE)) %>% group_by(age_bins,family,VC_ID,organism) %>% mutate(mean_relabund=mean(rel.abund))

metric_label=c("nucl.div_vOTU" = "Nucleotide Diversity","rel.abund_vOTU"="Relative Abundance")
heatmap_maturation_nucl_abund = vOTU_abund_nuclDiv %>% left_join(clusters_k3, by = "vOTU") %>% mutate(phase=case_when(cluster_phase == 1 ~ "pre-weaning",cluster_phase == 2 ~ "early post-weaning",.default = "late post-weaning")) %>% left_join(df_vOTUname2number,by="vOTU") %>% pivot_longer(cols = contains("_vOTU"), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") %>% mutate(age_bins = cut(age, breaks = seq(0, 650, by = 50), right = FALSE)) %>%  group_by(age_bins,vOTU_ID,phase,metric) %>% summarise(mean_value_metric = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%  group_by(vOTU_ID, metric) %>% mutate(scaled_value = as.numeric(scale(mean_value_metric))) %>% ungroup() %>% mutate(vOTU_ID=factor(vOTU_ID,levels=paste("vOTU",mat_temp_nucl_heatmap[[2]]$tree_row$order,sep=""))) %>% filter(!vOTU_ID %in% c("vOTU14","vOTU17")) %>% ggplot(aes(x = age_bins, y = vOTU_ID, fill = scaled_value)) + facet_wrap(~metric,labeller = labeller(metric = metric_label))+  geom_tile() + scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", name = "") + theme_classic(base_size = 30) +  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),axis.title.x = element_text(margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 30)))+labs(x="Infant chronological age bins (days)",y="")
heatmap_maturation_nucl_abund

#axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 20))
top_6vOTUs=df_importance_nucl %>% arrange(-mean_importance) %>% pull(species) %>% head(6)

test_important_filtered =  test_all_filtered %>% select(all_of(top_6vOTUs),"sample","trajectory") %>% pivot_longer(cols=all_of(top_6vOTUs),names_to = "vOTU",values_to = "nucl_div") #%>% group_by(vOTU,trajectory) %>% summarise(vOTU = vOTU, trajectory=trajectory,mean_nucl_div = mean(nucl_div))

test_important_filtered$trajectory = factor(test_important_filtered$trajectory ,levels=levels(all_children$trajectory))

dodge_width <- 0.8

important_vOTU_plot = test_important_filtered %>% filter(nucl_div !=0) %>% left_join(df_vOTUname2number,by="vOTU") %>% ggplot(aes(x=vOTU_ID,y=nucl_div,color=trajectory))+geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width), outlier.shape = NA)+geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = dodge_width, jitter.width = 0.2),alpha=0.5)+theme_classic(base_size = 27)+theme(axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 45,hjust = 1, vjust = 1),legend.position = "top",legend.direction = "vertical")+ylab("Log10 Nucleotide Diversity")+xlab("")+scale_color_manual(values=colorblind_palette)+labs(color="Growth Trajectories")+scale_y_log10()
important_vOTU_plot

stat_results <- test_important_filtered %>% group_by(trajectory,vOTU) %>% mutate(sum_acrossHealth= sum(nucl_div)) %>% filter(sum_acrossHealth !=0) %>%
  group_by(vOTU) %>%
  wilcox_test(nucl_div ~ trajectory, 
              ref.group = "Consistent normal growth",
              p.adjust.method = "fdr") %>% # Essential for multiple testing correction
  add_significance()
print(stat_results)

nucl_maturation_ab = plot_grid(plot_nucl_variation,plot_maturation_temperate,labels = c("A","B"),ncol = 2,rel_widths = c(0.5,0.5),axis = "lrtb",label_size = 24)

nucl_maturation_cd = plot_grid(heatmap_maturation_nucl_abund,plot_early_vs_late,labels = c("C","D"),ncol = 2,rel_widths = c(0.7,0.3),align = "hv",axis = "lrtb",label_size = 24)

nucl_maturation_ef = plot_grid(mat_temp_nucl_train_test[[7]]+theme_classic(base_size = 27)+theme(plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 10, l = 30),axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),legend.position = "none"),important_vOTU_plot,labels = c("E","F"),ncol = 2,rel_widths = c(0.5,0.5),align = "v",axis = "lrtb",label_size = 24)

nucl_maturation = plot_grid(nucl_maturation_ab,nucl_maturation_cd,nucl_maturation_ef,ncol = 1,rel_heights = c(0.3,0.4,0.3),align = "h",axis = "lrtb",label_size = 24)

ggsave(nucl_maturation,filename = "assets/nucl_maturation.png",device = "png",width=520,height = 750,unit="mm")

ggsave(mat_temp_nucl_heatmap[[1]],filename = "assets/importance_nucl.png",device = "png",width=250,height = 300,unit="mm")
```

#### what if I used both metrics ?

```{r}

#WHAT IF I USED BOTH

dataset_abund = list_datasets_temperate$train_healthy %>% select(sample,df_importance_VC$species) %>% filter(rowSums(select(.,df_importance_VC$species))!=0)

dataset_microdiv = list_datasets_microdiv$train_healthy %>% select(sample,df_importance_nucl$species) %>% filter(rowSums(select(.,df_importance_nucl$species))!=0)

common_samples = intersect(dataset_abund$sample,dataset_microdiv$sample)

dataset_abund = dataset_abund %>% filter(sample %in% common_samples) %>% select(df_importance_VC$species)
dataset_microdiv = dataset_microdiv %>% filter(sample %in% common_samples) %>% select(df_importance_nucl$species)

dist_abund = vegdist(dataset_abund,method = "bray")
dist_microdiv = vegdist(dataset_microdiv,method = "bray")

mantel_result <- mantel(dist_microdiv,dist_abund, method = "spearman", permutations = 999)
print(mantel_result)

df_mantel <- data.frame(Abundance_Dist = dist_abund, 
                        Microdiv_Dist = dist_microdiv)

mantel_micro_macro = ggplot(df_mantel, aes(x = Abundance_Dist, y = Microdiv_Dist)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, color = "steelblue") + # Use low alpha because there are many pairs
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "darkred") +
  labs(title = "Mantel Test Visualization",
       subtitle = paste("Mantel r = 0.428, p =", mantel_result$signif),
       x = "Phage Abundance Distance (Bray-Curtis)",
       y = "Microdiversity Distance (Bray-Curtis)") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 27)
```
