```{r}
ggsave(mantel_micro_macro,filename = "assets/mantel_micro_macro.png",device = "png",width=250,height = 250,unit="mm")


vOTU_nucl_abund_df = full_join(vOTU_nucl_div_df, viral_cluster_df, by = c("sample","age","subjectID.x","trajectory"))

vOTU_nucl_abund_df[is.na(vOTU_nucl_abund_df)]=0

predictors_both=union(predictors_VC,predictors_nucl)

list_datasets_both <- selectDatasets(vOTU_nucl_abund_df,sampled_infants,predictors_both)

df_importance_both = feature_selection(list_datasets_both$train_healthy,predictors_both)

#### Healthy maturation model #### 
mat_temp_both_heatmap=plots_maturation(df_importance_both,list_datasets_both$train_healthy)

#Remove samples were important VCs were always 0 in train and test sets. 
train_filtered = list_datasets_both$train_healthy
to_keep=train_filtered %>% select(df_importance_both$species) %>% rowSums()!=0
train_filtered=train_filtered[to_keep,]

test_all_filtered = list_datasets_both$test_all
to_keep=test_all_filtered %>% select(df_importance_both$species) %>% rowSums()!=0
test_all_filtered=test_all_filtered[to_keep,]

mat_temp_nucl_train_test = normal_growth_maturation(train_df = train_filtered,
                                                   predictors = df_importance_both$species,
                                                   test_df_allTrajectories = test_all_filtered,
                                                   organism = "Temperate Phages Nucl")

```

#### Controls - viral microdiversity

```{r}
#Coverage evaluation 
vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF = vOTU_nucl_div %>% left_join(viral_cluster_VC_to_PHF,by = c("scaffold"="genome")) %>% left_join(all_children[,-c(5,10:15,16,20:23)],by = c("sample" = "accession")) %>% drop_na(subjectID.x) %>% select(sample,scaffold,coverage,breadth,nucl_diversity,best_taxonomy_new,VC_ID,family,laz,subjectID.x,age,MAL_group,trajectory,sex) %>% distinct()

lifecycle_df= vPOP_coverage_lifeStyle[,c("contig","replication_cycle")] %>% unique()

vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC = vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF %>% left_join(lifecycle_df,by=c("scaffold"="contig"))

vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC_temperate = vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC %>% filter(replication_cycle %in% c("Temperate"),trajectory=="Consistent normal growth")

vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC_temperate$subjectID.x=factor(vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC_temperate$subjectID.x)
vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC_temperate$scaffold=factor(vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC_temperate$scaffold)

gam_nucl_div <- gam(nucl_diversity ~ age + s(scaffold, bs = "re")  + s(subjectID.x, bs = "re"), data = vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC_temperate)
summary(gam_nucl_div)
AIC(gam_nucl_div)

age_range <- seq(min(data_gam_bacteria$age), max(data_gam_bacteria$age)-50, length.out = 10)
ref_grid_nucl <- ref_grid(gam_nucl_div, at = list(age = age_range))
emm_nucl <- emmeans(ref_grid_nucl, ~ age)
emm_nucl = data.frame(emm_nucl)
#Add legend R2 and deviance explained
nucl_healthy=ggplot(emm_nucl, aes(x = age, y = emmean)) + geom_line(size=1,color=colorblind_palette[1])+  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL),alpha=0.2,fill=colorblind_palette[1]) +  labs(x = "Infant chronological age (days)",y = "GAM - EMMs (Z-Score)")+ theme_classic(base_size = 30)+theme(strip.text = element_text(face="bold"),plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 5, r = 20, b = 5, l = 10))+ scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 8)
nucl_healthy
ggsave(nucl_healthy,filename = "assets/nucl_overtime_gam.png",device = "png",width=500,height = 500,unit="mm")


vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC_temperate_imp = vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC %>% filter(replication_cycle %in% c("Temperate"), VC_ID %in% df_importance_VC$species)

vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC_temperate_imp$family = factor(vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC_temperate_imp$family,levels=c("Bacteroidaceae","Lachnospiraceae","Ruminococcaceae","Erysipelotrichaceae","Coriobacteriaceae","Bifidobacteriaceae","Selenomonadaceae")) 

plot_nucl_variation = vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC_temperate_imp  %>% ggplot(aes(x=reorder(scaffold,as.numeric(factor(family))),y=(nucl_diversity),color=family))+geom_boxplot()+geom_point(alpha=0.5)+theme_classic()+theme(axis.text.x  = element_blank())+ylab("Log10 scaled Nucleotide Diversity")+xlab("vOTUs")+scale_y_log10()+scale_color_manual(values=cbPalette_hosts)+labs(color="PHF")
plot_nucl_variation
#nucl_div against SNV count 
#ggplot(vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF,aes(y=nucl_diversity,x=divergent_site_count,color=stunted_status))+geom_point()+geom_smooth(method="lm")+theme_bw()


#nucl_div against coverage
nucl_coverage = ggplot(vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF,aes(y=nucl_diversity,x=log10(coverage),color=trajectory))+geom_point()+geom_smooth(method="lm")+theme_classic(base_size = 25)
ggsave(nucl_coverage,filename = "assets/nucl_coverage.png",device = "png",width=500,height = 500,unit="mm")

#vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF$log10_cov = log10(vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF$coverage)
#pi_vs_cov <- lmer(nucl_diversity ~ log10_cov * trajectory + (1 | subjectID.x) + 
 #                  (1 | scaffold), data = vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF)

pi_vs_cov <- lmer(nucl_diversity ~ coverage * trajectory + (1 | subjectID.x) + 
                   (1 | scaffold), data = vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF)


#Both abundance and microdiversity 
train_abund_nucl = viral_cluster_train %>% left_join(vOTU_nucl_div_Matrix_both,by=c("sample")) 
train_abund_nucl[is.na(train_abund_nucl)] <- 0

train_abund_nucl = train_abund_nucl %>% left_join(all_children[,-c(3,5,10:15,16,20:23)],by = c("sample" = "accession")) %>% drop_na(subjectID.x)

train_abund_nucl =train_abund_nucl[,c(1:3182)]
predictors=train_abund_nucl %>% select(-sample, -age) %>% names()
df_importance_both = feature_selection(train_abund_nucl,predictors)

all_test_abund_nucl = viral_cluster_ALLtest %>% left_join(vOTU_nucl_div_Matrix_both,by=c("sample")) 
all_test_abund_nucl[is.na(all_test_abund_nucl)] <- 0

to_keep=all_test_abund_nucl %>% select(df_importance_both$species) %>% rowSums()!=0
all_test_abund_nucl_filt=all_test_abund_nucl[to_keep,]

tempPhages_BOTH_maturation = normal_growth_maturation(train_df = train_abund_nucl,
                                                   predictors = df_importance_both$species,
                                                   test_df_allTrajectories=all_test_abund_nucl_filt,
                                                    organism = "Temperate Phages_ nucl.div")

newdata_all = rbind(mat_bacteria_train_test[[1]],mat_temperate_train_test[[1]])
predictions_healthy_all = rbind(mat_bacteria_train_test[[2]],mat_temperate_train_test[[2]])

plot_maturation_healthy = ggplot()+geom_line(data= newdata_all, aes(x = age, y = pred_age, linetype = organism),color = colorblind_palette[1], size = 1.2) +
    labs(x = "Age", y = "Predicted Age") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14)+scale_color_manual(values=colorblind_palette,name="")+ geom_point(data=predictions_healthy_all,aes(x=age,y=pred_age,shape=organism),color = colorblind_palette[1])+ scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.1))+scale_shape_manual(values = c(16,0,11))+geom_abline(slope = 1,intercept = 0)+annotate("text",x=12,y=500,label = r2_label(mat_bacteria_train_test[[2]],"Bacteria"),parse=T,size=5,hjust=0)+annotate("text",x=12,y=400,label = r2_label(mat_temperate_train_test[[2]],"Phages"),parse=T,size=5,hjust=0)+theme(legend.position = "top")+labs(shape="",linetype="")
plot_maturation_healthy 

```

#### nucleotide diversity GAM per vOTU

```{r}
#Models for specific vOTUs
#Test, biomarkers
vOTU_truncated <- vOTU_nucl_div %>% filter(age <= 200) %>% mutate(stunted_status = droplevels(factor(stunted_status)), scaffold = factor(scaffold))

library(broom) # For tidying model outputs
library(furrr)

#Only vOTUs with more than 20 observations
scaffolds_to_test <- vOTU_truncated %>% group_by(scaffold,stunted_status) %>% tally() %>% filter(n>=10) %>% group_by(scaffold) %>% tally() %>% filter(n>=2) %>% pull(scaffold)
  
#GAM on a single scaffold
run_scaffold_gam <- function(scaffold_id,data) {
  df_sub <- filter(data, scaffold == scaffold_id)
  df_sub = df_sub %>% filter(stunted_status %in% names(which(table(df_sub$stunted_status)>=5)))
  df_sub = droplevels(df_sub)
  tryCatch({
    # Fit GAM for the specific scaffold
    m <- gam(nucl_diversity ~ stunted_status + s(age, by = stunted_status, k = 5) + log10_cov,
             family = tw(), data = df_sub, method = "REML")
    
    # Extract smooth terms (the age dynamics)
    res <- tidy(m, parametric = FALSE) %>% mutate(scaffold = scaffold_id)
    
    return(res)
  }, error = function(e) return(NULL))
}

vOTU_truncated_new = vOTU_truncated %>%
    mutate(age_bin = cut(age, breaks = 2)) %>% # Divide age into 4 windows
    group_by(scaffold, stunted_status, age_bin) %>%
    summarize(n_bin = n(), .groups = "drop") %>% group_by(scaffold,stunted_status) %>% mutate(min_points= min(n_bin)) %>% filter(min(min_points)>=2)

results_all <- future_map_dfr(scaffolds_to_test,~run_scaffold_gam(.x,vOTU_truncated_new),.progress = TRUE)

results_final <- results_all %>% group_by(term) %>% mutate(p.adj = p.adjust(p.value, method = "fdr")) %>% arrange(p.adj)

top_sensitive_ids <- results_final %>% filter(p.adj <= 0.05) %>%
  pull(scaffold) %>% unique()

# Loop through the top 5 and create plots
plot_list <- lapply(top_sensitive_ids, function(sid) {
  # We need the specific model for that scaffold
  # Assuming you have a list of models or can re-run the top ones
  df_sub <- vOTU_truncated[vOTU_truncated$scaffold == sid, ]
  df_sub = df_sub %>% filter(stunted_status %in% names(which(table(df_sub$stunted_status)>=5)))
  df_sub = droplevels(df_sub)
  m_sub <- gam(nucl_diversity ~ stunted_status + s(age, by = stunted_status, k = 4) + log10_cov,
               family = tw(), data = df_sub)
  
  preds <- predict_response(m_sub, terms = c("age [all]", "stunted_status"))
  
  plot(preds, show_data = TRUE, dot_alpha = 1, dot_size = 1.5)+
    labs(title = paste("Scaffold:", sid),
         subtitle = "Diversity dynamics by nutritional status",
         y = "Nucleotide Diversity",
         x = "Age (Days)") +
    theme_minimal()
})

# Display the selected plot
plot_list[[2]]


replication_cycle_df=  vPOP_coverage_lifeStyle %>% select(contig,replication_cycle) %>% distinct() 

vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC %>% filter(replication_cycle %in% c("Temperate"), VC_ID %in% df_importance_VC$species) %>% ggplot(aes(x=reorder(scaffold,as.numeric(factor(family))),y=log10(nucl_diversity),color=family))+geom_boxplot()+geom_point(alpha=0.5)+theme_classic()+theme(axis.text.x  = element_blank())+ylab("Log10 scaled Nucleotide Diversity")+xlab("vOTUs")

vOTU_RC_nucl_assigned = vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC[vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC$replication_cycle=="Unassigned Life Style",]

vOTU_RC_nucl_assigned = droplevels(vOTU_RC_nucl_assigned)
pi_vs_age <- lmer(nucl_diversity ~ age*replication_cycle + (1 | subjectID.x) +  (1 | scaffold), data = vOTU_RC_nucl_assigned)

pi_vs_age_temp <- lmer(nucl_diversity ~ age*trajectory + (1 | subjectID.x) + (1 | scaffold), data =vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC[vOTU_nucl_div_to_VC_PHF_RC$replication_cycle=="Temperate",])

summary(pi_vs_age)
```

### PHF

```{r}

temperate_contigs=vPOP_coverage_lifeStyle %>% select(contig,replication_cycle) %>% distinct() %>% filter(replication_cycle=="Temperate") %>% pull(contig)

train = list_datasets_temperate[[1]]

host_pred_split_temperate = host_pred_split[host_pred_split$Virus %in% temperate_contigs,]

PHF_list= split(host_pred_split_temperate$Virus, host_pred_split_temperate$family)

viral_PHF_train <- as.data.frame(lapply(PHF_list, function(cols) {
  rowSums(train[, cols, drop = FALSE])
}))

viral_PHF_train <- cbind(train[, c("sample", "age")], viral_PHF_train)


viral_cluster_to_PHF = viral_family_cluster %>% left_join(host_pred_split, by = c("genome"="Virus"))
viral_cluster_to_PHF$best_taxonomy_new = gsub("[:|]", ".", viral_cluster_to_PHF$best_taxonomy_corrected)
viral_cluster_VC_to_PHF = viral_cluster_to_PHF %>% mutate(VC_ID = paste0("VC", match(best_taxonomy_new, unique(best_taxonomy_new)))) %>% distinct()

viral_cluster_to_VC = viral_cluster_VC_to_PHF[,c(13,14)] %>% distinct()
change_names_df=data.frame(Tax=names(viral_cluster_train))
change_names_df = change_names_df %>% left_join(viral_cluster_to_VC,by=c("Tax"="best_taxonomy_new"))

names(viral_cluster_train)[-c(1,2)] = change_names_df$VC_ID[-c(1,2)]
predictors=names(viral_cluster_train)[-c(1,2)]
df_importance_VC = feature_selection(viral_cluster_train,predictors)

```

### Plots

```{r}
#Plots
plot_maturation_healthy = ggplot()+geom_line(data= newdata, aes(x = age, y = pred_age, linetype = organism),color = colorblind_palette[1], size = 1.2) +
    labs(x = "Infant Chronological Age", y = "Microbiome Age") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14)+scale_color_manual(values=colorblind_palette,name="")+ geom_point(data=predictions_healthy,aes(x=age,y=pred_age,shape=organism),color = colorblind_palette[1])+ scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.1))+scale_shape_manual(values = c(16,0))+geom_abline(slope = 1,intercept = 0)+annotate("text",x=12,y=620,label = r2_label(mat_bacteria_train_test[[2]],"Bacteria"),parse=T,size=7,hjust=0)+annotate("text",x=12,y=550,label = r2_label(mat_temperate_train_test[[2]],"Phages"),parse=T,size=7,hjust=0)+theme(legend.position = "top")+labs(shape="",linetype="")
plot_maturation_healthy 

VC_mat_comparison_ab = plot_grid(plot_maturation_healthy,mat_temperate_train_test[[6]],ncol = 2, labels = c("A","B"),rel_widths = c(0.5, 0.5),rel_heights = c(0.3,0.7),align = "h",axis = "lrtb")

VC_mat_comparison_cd = plot_grid(ggdraw(mat_bact_heatmap[[2]]$gtable)+theme_classic(base_size = 15),ggdraw(mat_temperate_heatmap[[2]]$gtable)+theme_classic(base_size = 15),ncol = 2, labels = c("C","D"),rel_widths = c(0.6, 0.4),align = "h",axis = "lrtb")
VC_mat_comparison_cd

VC_mat_comparison_efg = plot_grid(plot_vc_phf,plot_correlation,mat_temperate_train_test[[7]],ncol = 3, labels = c("E","F","G"),rel_widths = c(0.3,0.3,0.4),align = "h",axis = "lrtb")


VC_mat_comparison = plot_grid(VC_mat_comparison_ab,VC_mat_comparison_cd,VC_mat_comparison_efg,ncol = 1,rel_heights = c(0.2,0.6,0.2),align = "h",axis = "lrtb")
ggsave(VC_mat_comparison,filename = "assets/NormalGrowth_maturation.png",device = "png",width=600,height = 800,unit="mm")

ggsave(VC_mat_comparison,filename = "assets/NormalGrowth_microdiv.png",device = "png",width=600,height = 800,unit="mm")



microdiversity_plots_ab = plot_grid(plot_nucl_variation,mat_temp_nucl_train_test[[6]],ncol = 2,labels = c("A","B"),rel_widths = c(0.5,0.5),align = "h",axis = "lrtb")

microdiversity_plots_cd = plot_grid(mat_temperate_train_test[[7]],mat_temp_nucl_train_test[[7]],ncol = 2,labels = c("C","D"),rel_widths = c(0.5,0.5),align = "h",axis = "lrtb")

microdiversity_plots = plot_grid(microdiversity_plots_ab,microdiversity_plots_cd,important_vOTU_plot,ncol = 1,rel_heights = c(0.2,0.6,0.2),align = "h",axis = "lrtb")
ggsave(microdiversity_plots,filename = "assets/microdiv_plots.png",device = "png",width=300,height = 500,unit="mm")



ggsave(tempPhages_healthy_maturation[[3]],filename = "assets/temperate_healthy_maturation.png",device = "png",width=200,height = 200,unit="mm")

ggsave(tempPhages_healthy_maturation[[6]],filename = "assets/temperate_healthy_weaningCat.png",device = "png",width=200,height = 200,unit="mm")

ggsave(,filename = "assets/temperate_healthy_weaningCat.png",device = "png",width=200,height = 200,unit="mm")

plot_maturity_gap = plot_grid(bacteria_healthy_maturation[[7]], tempPhages_healthy_maturation[[7]], labels = c("Bacteria","Temperate Phages"))
ggsave(plot_maturity_gap,filename = "assets/maturity_gap.png",device = "png",width=300,height = 300,unit="mm")


comparison = rbind(bacteria_healthy_maturation[[4]] , tempPhages_healthy_maturation[[4]])
plot_squarederror_compared= comparison %>% ggplot(aes(x=trajectory,y=squared_error,color=organism))+geom_point(alpha=0.8,position = position_jitterdodge())+geom_boxplot()+stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", label = "p.signif",label.y = 400,size=7)+labs(color="")+labs(title="Comparing Shannon Diversity During Normal Growth across Communities")+xlab("")+ylab("Sample Prediction Error (Days)")+theme_classic(base_size = 15)+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90))+scale_color_manual(values=organism_palette,name="")

plot_squarederror_compared
df_importance_bact_original = df_importance_bact
healthy_matrix_train_original =  healthy_matrix_train

df_importance_bact$species = gsub("s__","",df_importance_bact$species)
df_importance_bact$species = gsub("^([A-Z])[a-z]+_", "\\1_", df_importance_bact$species)
names(healthy_matrix_train)=gsub("s__","",names(healthy_matrix_train))
names(healthy_matrix_train) = gsub("^([A-Z])[a-z]+_", "\\1_", names(healthy_matrix_train))
  
p_bact_imp = plots_maturation(df_importance_bact,healthy_matrix_train)
p_bact_abundance_gtable = p_bact_imp[[2]]$gtable
p_bact_abundance_gtable$grobs[p_bact_abundance_gtable$layout$name == "legend"]=NULL
p_bact_abundance_gtable$layout = p_bact_abundance_gtable$layout[p_bact_abundance_gtable$layout$name != "legend",]
p_bact_abundance_gtable$widths[5] <- unit(0, "bigpts")

plot_abundance_bacteria = plot_grid(p_bact_imp[[1]], p_bact_abundance_gtable,ncol = 2, labels = c("A", "B"))
ggsave(plot_abundance_bacteria,filename = "assets/bacteria_maturation.png",device = "png",width=300,height = 300,unit="mm") 

p_tempPhages_imp = plots_maturation(df_importance_VC,viral_cluster_train)
p_tempPhages_abundance_gtable = p_tempPhages_imp[[2]]$gtable

plot_abundance_tempPhages = plot_grid(p_tempPhages_imp[[1]], p_tempPhages_abundance_gtable,ncol = 2, labels = c("A", "B"))
ggsave(plot_abundance_tempPhages,filename = "assets/temperate_maturation.png",device = "png",width=300,height = 300,unit="mm")



#Correlation bacterial host, phage abundance. 


#NOT ANYMORE 

#setEPS()
#postscript("Zimbabwe_bacteria/healthy_test_bacteria.eps", width = 7, height = 7, paper = "special", horizontal = FALSE)


#Compare error
data_comp_pred_data <- data.frame(age = predictions$age)

data_comp_pred_data$subjectID.x <- factor(predictions_healthy$subjectID.x[1],
                                          levels = levels(predictions_healthy$subjectID.x))

# Predict fitted values
data_comp_pred_data$predicted_healthy <- predict(gam_model, data_comp_pred_data,type = "response")

data_comp_pred_data$stunted_status = predictions$stunted_status
data_comp_pred_data$predicted_age_rf= predictions$pred_age


data_comp_pred_data$error= data_comp_pred_data$predicted_age_rf - data_comp_pred_data$predicted_healthy

ggplot(data_comp_pred_data, aes(y = error, x = stunted_status, color = stunted_status)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.5) +geom_jitter(width = 0.1, size = 0.8, alpha = 0.4) +theme_bw() + scale_color_manual(values = colorblind_palette, name = "Nutritional Status") + ylab("Predicted age if healthy - Real age") +xlab("") + geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +  annotate("rect", ymin = -Inf, ymax = 0, xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, 
           fill = colorblind_palette[2], alpha = 0.1) + geom_text(aes(x = 1.5, y = -380, label = "Immature"),color = "black", size = 4) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", ref.group = "Healthy",label = "p.signif", hide.ns = FALSE) + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),                                            strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom")

#data_comp_pred_data_bins <- data_comp_pred_data %>%   mutate(age_bin = cut(age, 
                 #      breaks = c(0, 150, 400, 600), 
                  #     labels = c("0-150 days", "151-400 days", "401-600 days"),
                   #    include.lowest = TRUE))

```

### Experiment independent samples.

```{r}

independent_df_normal = profile_metadata %>% filter(trajectory == "Consistent normal growth") %>% group_by(subjectID.x) %>% slice_sample(n = 1) %>% ungroup()

independent_df_stunted = profile_metadata %>% filter(trajectory != "Consistent normal growth") %>% group_by(subjectID.x) %>% slice_sample(n = 1) %>% ungroup()

hist(independent_df_normal$age)
hist(independent_df_stunted$age)

train_index = createDataPartition(independent_df_normal$age, p=0.7,list=F)
train = independent_df_normal[train_index,] %>% select(c(starts_with("s__"),"sample","age"))
test = independent_df_normal[-train_index,] 

independent_df_stunted_test_normal = rbind(independent_df_stunted,test)

predictors = colnames(train)[grep("s__",colnames(train))]

independent_important = feature_selection(train,predictors)
mat_bacteria_independent = normal_growth_maturation(train,independent_important$species,independent_df_stunted_test_normal,"Bacteria")
```
